name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: You have my sincere gratitude
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
I hope you are proud of what we accomplished together
Friend
As the counting comes to a close, it is evident that outstanding votes are unlikely to change the outcome of the race. I would like to thank each and everyone of you for the amazing amount of effort, discipline and love you have poured into this race.
While the result is not what we hoped for, it is a result of which we can all be extremely proud. Against the odds, this was a close election. We won more votes than any Democratic candidate ever has in PA-10 in a midterm election that favored the Republican party. Most importantly, we earned the support of a coalition of voters from all parties who believe in standing up for our Democracy and its institutions.
I couldn’t have gotten to where we are without the dedication of so many people, this was truly a team effort and I am grateful to everyone who supported this campaign. The County Party Chairs, committee members and volunteers who helped gather signatures, staff events, work the polls, provide childcare and helped raise funds, donors who bet their resources on democracy, those who engaged in the process for the first time and those who engaged one more time because they knew how high the stakes were. My primary opponent, Rick Coplen, who became a true partner in this effort. The other Democratic candidates who put themselves out there knowing the battles we faced would be tough, you were wonderful partners on the trail. My staff, Jared Eckert, Jillian Johnson and Pamela Parson who stepped up to do the work that would normally be completed by many more, and my general consulting firm, Indigo Strategies for being good stewards and partners in an unpredictable election cycle.
On March 7 of this year, after consulting with friends and family, I made the decision to run for Congress in PA’s 10th. I had not anticipated making that run so this campaign started without the resources that other candidates for congress spend months building prior to announcing their candidacies. In 8 months I was able to raise enough money to win a primary, run a solid campaign, hire a small, but talented and dedicated staff, and recruit volunteers who poured their time and resources into our campaign.
Many experts, including decision makers at the national level, saw this campaign as one that wasn’t worth investing in. They saw a tough district in a midterm election that was expected to favor the other party, and a candidate who was different than the types of candidates who had run in this district before - the primary caretaker of a minor child, someone who still needed to work to earn a living, and a woman of color running in what they incorrectly believed was an area where more traditional candidates had a strong advantage who had 8 short months to put together a campaign, where 18 to 24 months is considered the norm. They also saw an opponent who was a 10 year incumbent, the leader of the most extreme elements in his party, and connected to powerful interests with deep pockets.
Those experts were correct about our campaign having a lot of challenges to overcome in many ways. However, over the last 8 months, I have seen how so many of the considerations that made this race challenging, were either not challenges at all or assets. My team learned how to integrate childcare into their planning early on, and volunteers learned that childcare was necessary for this race to be successful, working kept me relevant to voters in the District and voters learned that our shared values and shared aspirations for the district were held across region, gender, race, ability or class.
We raised less than a quarter of the campaign funds raised by my opponent, but our contributions came from well over 4,000 donors who believed in our campaign, in me as a candidate, and in our shared mission. I am not just grateful, but proud of every one of those contributions. In the end, they allowed us to get our message out in a big way, and to keep this campaign going to achieve an amazing result.
In closing, I would like to say a huge thank you to the many, many people who made this campaign possible. I would also like to wish Congressman Perry
congratulations
as well as wisdom and integrity as he represents the people of the PA’s 10th Congressional District.
With continued gratitude for all you have done,
- Shamaine

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843386:J41j1pGN3:m:1:3331421248:AB0F87122E98DC4A04E7F03771CB9B74:r) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. name: Austin Davis, Lieutenant Governor-Elect
subject: This is a special moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
From the bottom of my heart — thank you. I can’t even put into words what this moment means — and the message this sends to millions — throughout Pennsylvania and this nation.

Derek, this is a special moment — a historic moment — because Pennsylvania chose unity over division, love over hate, progress over extremism. **Pennsylvania chose to elect the first Black Lieutenant Governor in our Commonwealth’s history.** And I am humbled. From the bottom of my heart — thank you. I can’t even put into words what this moment means — and the message this sends to millions — throughout Pennsylvania and this nation. Throughout this campaign, I’ve crisscrossed this Commonwealth — and it’s been an honor to meet and to listen to Pennsylvanians in rural, urban, and suburban communities — and in communities across our state that are too often left behind. I saw people from all walks of life come together, from kids in North Philly and hard-working men and women in union halls, to church parishioners at Sunday masses and families at county fairs and picnics — no matter Republican, Democrat, or Independent — people came together, got off the sidelines, and made the choice to denounce hate and extremism and to unite behind a vision that would move Pennsylvania forward for everyone. They chose to stand by leaders who they know will work for them, and put them first. As the son of a union bus driver and a hairdresser, I know what it’s like to come from a family that oftentimes had to get creative to make ends meet. It was because of a community that loved and cared for one another, a good public school and good teachers, and a union that allowed my father to make a living wage that allowed him to support our family, that a young Black kid from a small and old steel town too often overlooked by the powers in Washington and Harrisburg, was able to grow up to become the first Black legislator outside the city of Pittsburgh — and now the first Black Lieutenant Governor. But this is more than just my moment — it’s so much larger than that. This is a moment that defines us as a Commonwealth. That says to extremists, to those who sought to roll back women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, and workers’ rights — to those who wanted to restrict our fundamental freedoms — that we won’t go back and we will never back down. **Most importantly, Pennsylvania has sent a message to young people across our Commonwealth — the next generation of leaders — that Pennsylvania will always be a place where all are welcomed and where all will have opportunities to succeed.** In the weeks leading up to this moment, I’ve thought a lot about my grandparents. One grandfather was a steel worker and the other was a railroad foreman for B&O railroad. Both of them came to Pennsylvania from the South to create a better life for our family, just like I'm sure many of your families. I don't think my grandparents ever imagined that their grandson would be elected to the second highest office in this Commonwealth, but they fought to make sure that I had that chance. That I had the right to vote and that when I walked into a room — that my voice would not only be respected, but heard. They ensured that I had the opportunity to chart my own path and that I could be standing on this stage with you all right now. I often say the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. That’s why I have a message for all the hardworking families across our Commonwealth. I say to you, that you are not alone, that I hear you and understand your worries, because I’ve lived them, and that as your next Lieutenant Governor — I will be your champion. I will make whatever sacrifices are needed — just like my grandparents did for me — to ensure that every child and family in this Commonwealth has opportunities to succeed — so that every generation that comes after can be better off than the one that came before. Governor-Elect Josh Shapiro and I are going to create an economy that works for everyone, to help working-class folks struggling with inflation, to make sure people have more money in their pockets. To make sure our kids have good schools, and that our working families have more opportunities to succeed. And because of you, starting tonight — we get to work on making those things a reality. Thank you. Let’s get to work, Austin Davis
_Lieutenant Governor-Elect of Pennsylvania_ __ __ __ __ __ __

clean_body: From the bottom of my heart — thank you. I can’t even put into words what this moment means — and the message this sends to millions — throughout Pennsylvania and this nation. Derek, this is a special moment — a historic moment — because Pennsylvania chose unity over division, love over hate, progress over extremism. Pennsylvania chose to elect the first Black Lieutenant Governor in our Commonwealth’s history. And I am humbled. From the bottom of my heart — thank you. I can’t even put into words what this moment means — and the message this sends to millions — throughout Pennsylvania and this nation. Throughout this campaign, I’ve crisscrossed this Commonwealth — and it’s been an honor to meet and to listen to Pennsylvanians in rural, urban, and suburban communities — and in communities across our state that are too often left behind. I saw people from all walks of life come together, from kids in North Philly and hard-working men and women in union halls, to church parishioners at Sunday masses and families at county fairs and picnics — no matter Republican, Democrat, or Independent — people came together, got off the sidelines, and made the choice to denounce hate and extremism and to unite behind a vision that would move Pennsylvania forward for everyone. They chose to stand by leaders who they know will work for them, and put them first. As the son of a union bus driver and a hairdresser, I know what it’s like to come from a family that oftentimes had to get creative to make ends meet. It was because of a community that loved and cared for one another, a good public school and good teachers, and a union that allowed my father to make a living wage that allowed him to support our family, that a young Black kid from a small and old steel town too often overlooked by the powers in Washington and Harrisburg, was able to grow up to become the first Black legislator outside the city of Pittsburgh — and now the first Black Lieutenant Governor. But this is more than just my moment — it’s so much larger than that. This is a moment that defines us as a Commonwealth. That says to extremists, to those who sought to roll back women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, and workers’ rights — to those who wanted to restrict our fundamental freedoms — that we won’t go back and we will never back down. Most importantly, Pennsylvania has sent a message to young people across our Commonwealth — the next generation of leaders — that Pennsylvania will always be a place where all are welcomed and where all will have opportunities to succeed. In the weeks leading up to this moment, I’ve thought a lot about my grandparents. One grandfather was a steel worker and the other was a railroad foreman for B&O railroad. Both of them came to Pennsylvania from the South to create a better life for our family, just like I'm sure many of your families. I don't think my grandparents ever imagined that their grandson would be elected to the second highest office in this Commonwealth, but they fought to make sure that I had that chance. That I had the right to vote and that when I walked into a room — that my voice would not only be respected, but heard. They ensured that I had the opportunity to chart my own path and that I could be standing on this stage with you all right now. I often say the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. That’s why I have a message for all the hardworking families across our Commonwealth. I say to you, that you are not alone, that I hear you and understand your worries, because I’ve lived them, and that as your next Lieutenant Governor — I will be your champion. I will make whatever sacrifices are needed — just like my grandparents did for me — to ensure that every child and family in this Commonwealth has opportunities to succeed — so that every generation that comes after can be better off than the one that came before. Governor-Elect Josh Shapiro and I are going to create an economy that works for everyone, to help working-class folks struggling with inflation, to make sure people have more money in their pockets. To make sure our kids have good schools, and that our working families have more opportunities to succeed. And because of you, starting tonight — we get to work on making those things a reality. Thank you. name: Jahana Hayes
subject: A short Veterans Day note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Today, to our veterans and their families, we want to say thank you. Thank you for your courage and your sacrifice. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54453338/378609190/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2YxNzM3Yy1kODYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfDztPrZDQKIso0PAcVGj28JlJhAF4Or6sjD6sjzbYo=&emci=d96d4ba7-ce61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=fcf1737c-d861-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=15529135) | Today, to our veterans and their families, we want to say thank you. Thank you for your courage and your sacrifice. While we reflect, remember, and show gratitude for those who have sacrificed for our country, we also have a duty to take action to ensure that our veterans get the services and support they need when transitioning into civilian life. Many veterans return home carrying visible and invisible scars, are unable to find good-paying jobs, can’t access veterans’ health care, and face high rates of homelessness. I am proud to fight for better health care, better wages, and other common-sense solutions to serve those who have served us. That’s why I have continually supported proposals that bolster funding for the VA, provide jobs and educational opportunities for veterans, and support Gold Star families. I worked across the aisle to get four pieces of veteran legislation signed into law and my office was named the only Purple Heart office of Distinction in the entire Northeast because of our work to help veterans in the district navigate the Department of Veterans Affairs and other federal agencies. I hope you will join me today by taking a moment to remember and honor our veterans and servicemembers. While we may never know the extent of their sacrifice, we can ensure they know the extent of our gratitude. – Jahana
---

clean_body: Today, to our veterans and their families, we want to say thank you. Thank you for your courage and your sacrifice. | | Today, to our veterans and their families, we want to say thank you. Thank you for your courage and your sacrifice. While we reflect, remember, and show gratitude for those who have sacrificed for our country, we also have a duty to take action to ensure that our veterans get the services and support they need when transitioning into civilian life. Many veterans return home carrying visible and invisible scars, are unable to find good-paying jobs, can’t access veterans’ health care, and face high rates of homelessness. I am proud to fight for better health care, better wages, and other common-sense solutions to serve those who have served us. That’s why I have continually supported proposals that bolster funding for the VA, provide jobs and educational opportunities for veterans, and support Gold Star families. I worked across the aisle to get four pieces of veteran legislation signed into law and my office was named the only Purple Heart office of Distinction in the entire Northeast because of our work to help veterans in the district navigate the Department of Veterans Affairs and other federal agencies. I hope you will join me today by taking a moment to remember and honor our veterans and servicemembers. While we may never know the extent of their sacrifice, we can ensure they know the extent of our gratitude. – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you need to update your contact information, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: You made it happen: Governor-elect Tina Kotek
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54453920/378612165/-1186153914?story_fbid=pfbid0VSfbF81TYUJc64QD46rR6bvC8VrH6rDcuzt71WN4ZDKimRqCFpLEoHhAa6ejjkLjl&id=94132541397&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMjU5OWU1LWQ5NjEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTFlZTFkYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZHbTuL1e76A4OK964lrFpKapbqBbXq3f0dGZD7XTxrs=&emci=03089009-3261-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=6e2599e5-d961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi there, **Our next governor is going to be climate champion Tina Kotek!** You helped make this happen. You made sure Oregon will continue to meet the climate crisis with the urgency and action we need. **Thank you!** In this election it was very clear that Oregon was either going to continue moving forward on climate action or take significant steps backward. **The message from voters is very clear: we want climate action and we want climate leadership.** In no race is that clearer than in the governor’s race. Governor-elect Tina Kotek is genuinely and deeply committed to tackling the climate crisis while centering equity and justice. She has a record of climate leadership, often behind the scenes but always effective. In her run for governor, climate change was a top priority. She’s ready to hold big polluters accountable. Ready to advance clean energy solutions that make our cars pollute less and our homes and buildings healthier and more efficient. Ready to ensure historically marginalized communities, including low-income and BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, and people of color) communities, are centered in a just transition to a clean energy economy. **Governor-elect Tina Kotek’s climate leadership has only just begun.** Join us in congratulating our next governor on social media: **[Facebook](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54453922/378612167/-1186153914?story_fbid=pfbid0VSfbF81TYUJc64QD46rR6bvC8VrH6rDcuzt71WN4ZDKimRqCFpLEoHhAa6ejjkLjl&id=94132541397&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMjU5OWU1LWQ5NjEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTFlZTFkYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZHbTuL1e76A4OK964lrFpKapbqBbXq3f0dGZD7XTxrs=&emci=03089009-3261-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=6e2599e5-d961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=2107230)** , [**Twitter**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54453924/378612168/-166244989?s=46&t=m6I86KC-z3ZmeQjj-Z1lgw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMjU5OWU1LWQ5NjEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTFlZTFkYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZHbTuL1e76A4OK964lrFpKapbqBbXq3f0dGZD7XTxrs=&emci=03089009-3261-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=6e2599e5-d961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=2107230),**** and **[Instagram](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54453926/378612171/1756910467?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMjU5OWU1LWQ5NjEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTFlZTFkYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZHbTuL1e76A4OK964lrFpKapbqBbXq3f0dGZD7XTxrs=&emci=03089009-3261-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=6e2599e5-d961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=2107230)****.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54453927/378612174/-1186153914?story_fbid=pfbid0VSfbF81TYUJc64QD46rR6bvC8VrH6rDcuzt71WN4ZDKimRqCFpLEoHhAa6ejjkLjl&id=94132541397&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMjU5OWU1LWQ5NjEtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTFlZTFkYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZHbTuL1e76A4OK964lrFpKapbqBbXq3f0dGZD7XTxrs=&emci=03089009-3261-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=6e2599e5-d961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=2107230)
Because climate voters came out in force this election, **Oregon has also re-elected pro-climate, and pro-environment majorities to the state Senate and House!** In those majorities, we elected new climate champs like state Representatives-elect **Farrah Chaichi** , who for years was an OLCV volunteer leader, and **Mark Gamba** , the mayor of Milwaukie who made the city a beacon of local climate action. Across the state, pro-environment and pro-climate candidates won. This election was also a big year for Oregon’s congressional races. For OLCV, that is especially true of one race in particular – **Andrea Salinas** running for CD 6 in the mid-Willamette Valley. While not all the results are in yet, we are cautiously optimistic. Andrea is a former OLCV board member, a dedicated environmental and climate champion, and just a fantastic human being. If she holds her current lead in this race (fingers crossed!), she will be a phenomenal addition to Oregon’s congressional delegation and to the U.S. House as a whole. From statewide to local, congratulations to all the OLCV-endorsed candidates who won! Thank you to all the climate voters, volunteers, donors, canvassers, phone bankers, LTE writers, and more! Thank you for continuing to show up! Lindsey Scholten
Deputy Director, OLCV |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over... yet
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. And today I need your help. |
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be437fd89c8841e5a816c10fcf5844b4&_e=NVoGoOTAaWH0HvWvdXl19GKP3qzqroVVJ4ZN2VnHKNoLF6CObxGfPCAD6TVIjCCf_-3zV7v8AM0c_TICQzvHE_PYQyhs2iLsTkHQRfqT3gdWTZjzwdv_0rIwIVVZoljqbyhyw3yL_6UM_Xck6wL7J8z1zmyFI7aNpjXg8tnFCgKLFLwn0xSlQrfAHk7Hv4MztR38tUBCKKihHhIv0eTVV0o2e6C9AFQmwrl3HywlPR-2eqORHWyq6BtpyaFBAYXpLiwe69uMpS-UFpSDngBvVXMX7WqK6OeVJbpyFZapphqgChz_wyga4N_R9KDb8xzBynGhi1aiOkSgIGyKGC9Xbe3-3QjXaoL9fmZQxjBV6dLTMiJ-e9nlpVaLCSCMOYk2)**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be437fd89c8841e5a816c10fcf5844b4&_e=NVoGoOTAaWH0HvWvdXl19GKP3qzqroVVJ4ZN2VnHKNoLF6CObxGfPCAD6TVIjCCf_-3zV7v8AM0c_TICQzvHE_PYQyhs2iLsTkHQRfqT3gdWTZjzwdv_0rIwIVVZoljqbyhyw3yL_6UM_Xck6wL7J8z1zmyFI7aNpjXg8tnFCgKLFLwn0xSlQrfAHk7Hv4MztR38tUBCKKihHhIv0eTVV0o2e6C9AFQmwrl3HywlPR9jDR_-dbtytzWxBet8awjXpWqcAXYQejvKoIgAHR_4ZG4omku_JPxJDg2p0ozHTfHKzjSbqa4k2eNPBKgEDwyodKedk8lUTXfmsX0hHr67_Suiaddq1EFb_XhS58rSS-8paFt1bvW5k97Mt3yq3yzL)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

body:

| | | It's Amb. Nikki Haley. We came out short in GA once again.... The good news is, the fight doesn't end here. We can still flip Georgia RED. We forced Raphel Warnock into a runoff election and we have one last game to play.

The bad news is, Herschel Walker had to spend every last cent to get this far.

Meanwhile, Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock are raring to go with a million dollar arsenal to unleash on us in the runoff.

But we can demolish their cash advantage if everyone reading this message makes an emergency contribution of $25.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to a runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdtb2r4j31o66pdm752mun3qq32d12slfkp3n80g_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udqmbd5k6srb8sr3egr68ttkeljr2clmcsrmcpjjelhn4tbjclon2pr2e6p69dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphh6sqj1ptnc9j32s5lm9jr1db5e8iv0)
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |
---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia 's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1rkjbg938udh6kkhv9qch7nincje1n1j9kr5oco_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs)**
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqjkt4rli13ahlebv4oioebc7pol7n46p9ot9hs8_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs) [** RUSH $5 -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za5givvjru1jhe1dutru0d2pj87p2jhhsliah5dg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs) [** RUSH $10 -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi69o4t2v3ohivdf22q0s9c27cp0338idlu8mgmg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs) [** RUSH $34 -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zusdrrf41p4t5m7uh9b1qgv4rlbvpnvhusnjtk9o_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf5hjh73n50h3tul3o1qvevdsjve57n6mbcog7co_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8tolc5tshnl3re2qbe3puv9d6i2r3bt4i42fsag_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf0jpf4kukpvjr0ecc7c71bspvct4pug8t77481o_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7ujlegug4g0ss5t3ph2v1t2a9180s9kngd8ue48_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z83qg4e5nohos3kk3g3dluqh8uj3eqm79ms46ug0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk75pkrbc18il15um74hs8f83r0nvf5lfmplvr1o_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z71am5s1v9p7liai92ipettj9ve2btmov0rr7r9o_rp22sh2s8i66or0shge4pr3c5h2bs)

Full of courage and zeal, your consistent hard work and outstanding service have ensured protections for our everyday liberties, granting us a chance at a full and free life void of fear and danger. Whether you are on active duty or retired, each of you has played an instrumental role in our nation’s advancement and the stability of our democracy. We could not be more grateful for your selflessness in service to our country. Today, we pause to celebrate you and offer our most sincere thanks for everything you’ve done to protect the nation we call home. \- Lisa Blunt Rochester ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Tuesday was a victory for us and democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RcHEwYWFht09QiRrse%2FRoFNKdbHU6Pvq&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Tuesday night was a decisive victory for our campaign, and it's thanks to your unwavering support that we were able to protect this seat. Thank you.
I hope you know that I will continue to fight with everything I have for the issues we care about so deeply. To protect our Social Security and Medicare against Republican attempts to decimate both programs. To enshrine women's reproductive freedom into federal law. To keep tackling the scourge of gun violence and make progress against the climate crisis. Against any big and powerful special interests that attempt to forestall this progress.
I will also continue to work with any reasonable colleagues across the aisle toward all possible progress on the critical issues that face our nation. However, there will be no compromise with any forces that attempt to overrun our democracy. Tuesday night, democracy won, and it must always prevail.
Together, in partnership with President Biden, we've accomplished a great deal over the last two years. While control of the Senate still hangs in the balance, I remain hopeful and determined that we will accomplish even more in the coming months.
Again, thank you for everything. It's because of people like you opening emails like this - taking action, giving whatever you could - that we were able to win last night. I will always be grateful for everything you've done.
Sincerely,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3MG7c1vY%2BIZHXWAdJbWYa1NKdbHU6Pvq&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Fellow American, This nurse practitioner's story deserves to go viral. It's a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don't draw the line for freedom. [**_That's why we're suing CVS_**** _._**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzE1LTc0YzNmYzg5MjlhYjQ4ZDZhNDg2NmM5M2VhNTRiMDMzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9RkZPMzI3MzcifQ/wMjkrpBju6s_sTClSf2Pow) But I'm getting ahead of myself. Paige Casey is a young nurse practitioner. For years, she faithfully served her community, working as a nurse practitioner at a local CVS MinuteClinic in Virginia. When she was hired, she made her employer aware that her Catholic faith prevented her from prescribing or dispensing abortion-inducing drugs._ _ CVS accommodated her religious conviction for three-and-a-half years and didn't require her to administer any life-ending drugs. But then in 2022, they told Paige they would no longer allow her religious freedom. A few months later, **_she was fired-just two days after earning a performance-based raise._** **This is blatant religious discrimination, and according to Virginia law - it's illegal.**
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzE1LTc0YzNmYzg5MjlhYjQ4ZDZhNDg2NmM5M2VhNTRiMDMzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9RkZPMzI3MzcifQ/lJXyw32jHxok0JJCeRN1Cw)
---
With the ongoing effects still felt from the pandemic, health care workers are needed now more than ever. Forcing them to choose between violating their faith or being fired **_hurts everyone. _** **_And it's downright un-American. _** Patients are best served by doctors, nurses, and other medical professionals who are free to act ethically and consistent with their beliefs. Despite having a spotless record, Paige is now _unemployed_ , simply because she stood for her faith. This unlawful discrimination cannot be allowed to stand. That's why Alliance Defending Freedom is filing a lawsuit against CVS on behalf of Paige. ADF is the world's largest legal organization committed to protecting religious freedom, free speech, marriage and family, parental rights, and the sanctity of life. We defend your most cherished liberties in Congress, state legislatures, and courtrooms across the country - all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court if necessary. [**But we need your help. Will you help us send a strong message to CVS by signing our petition below?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzE1LTc0YzNmYzg5MjlhYjQ4ZDZhNDg2NmM5M2VhNTRiMDMzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9RkZPMzI3MzcifQ/jh2N_mOs0acbDvZuu6HChA) **_We the People, CVS customers, will not stand by and watch attacks on the religious rights of all Americans. _**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzE1LTc0YzNmYzg5MjlhYjQ4ZDZhNDg2NmM5M2VhNTRiMDMzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9RkZPMzI3MzcifQ/0328bFbm1fhVF-grIn6c0g)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Two years ago, the Republicans took a congressional seat by six votes--six! A two-vote swing over six votes. We lost a second seat by only 109 votes! Sen. Cortez Masto’s campaign had nothing left after the election, and it’s expensive to help supervise a close vote count. Can you help protect the integrity of the election by making sure that every voter Sen. Cortez Masto inspired can be counted fairly?
body:
Your help urgently needed
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4e793de-d927-4f3c-b34f-46131873dffe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, As someone who's worked on local, state and national campaigns I've seen this too many times – when races come down to a few votes and it's too close to call. That's what's happening in Nevada RIGHT NOW, and [with Senate control on the line, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (D) needs our help.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd62f681-6591-4667-95c0-9958a924bbf8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [RIGHT NOW.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2f2d21c-f0f4-42aa-8e14-a94f2da4d4b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) For example, **two years ago, the Republicans took a congressional seat by six votes--six!** A two-vote swing over six votes. **We lost a second seat by only 109 votes!** It takes SERIOUS RESOURCES after spending so much in such a close race. Republicans will do everything they can to try and steal this victory from us. **[To ensure Republicans won't and can't steal this election, can you give $5, $10 or whatever you can afford so we can make sure Senator Cortez Masto has the resources necessary for staff and lawyers during any counting or recounting process?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03169f29-d03e-4d8a-93e3-5efee9b4598d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Sen. Cortez Masto Needs Your Help**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T664cd774-e575-402f-abc9-fed9a1e8d58c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **The Cortez Masto campaign spent everything supporters like you and Blue Amp sent them on getting out their message and turning out the vote. There’s nothing left.** And we refuse to let them find a way to toss votes because we don't have the staff and/or lawyers to ensure the process is fair. **[To ensure Republicans won't and can't steal this election, can you give $5, $10 or whatever you can afford so we can make sure Senator Cortez Masto has the resources necessary for staff and lawyers during any counting or recounting process?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc13d510a-6374-469b-82d2-828cb7665e59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks so much for making sure every vote is counted! Cliff

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Peter,
**B R E A K I N G N E W S. **
**Our Senate Race in Georgia is going to a RUNOFF. **
**WE MUST WIN THIS RACE TO TAKE BACK OUR MAJORITY. EVERYTHING COMES DOWN TO THIS, Peter.**
The Democrats' MEGA donors will pour MILLIONS of dollars into Georgia because they know that's the ONLY way they can win. __You have been one of our STRONGEST patriots from the very beginning, and our country desperately needs you to step up ONE MORE TIME to help us TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY AND WIN THIS RACE.__
Please, the future of our country is on the line, and we desperately need your support.
[_**Please contribute $34 or more AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846261:JzCQCpGiN:m:1:3317145305:57A9A26794661F019EDCB2F07D5C1428:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Is this what you want?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843291:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843291:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843292:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843293:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843294:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843291:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843291:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843291:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61843291:JyKpCpGSN:m:1:3331703221:F2C04FC16EBF0E5E303659FF0AE55D47:r)

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845260:6tHWCpGNc:m:1:3372944669:3B73277DD03A358367E9B87AA5FBFC5D:r) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845260:6tHWCpGNc:m:1:3372944669:3B73277DD03A358367E9B87AA5FBFC5D:r)**

subject: Control of the Senate runs through Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845291:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845291:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845292:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845293:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845294:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845291:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845291:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845291:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845291:JygpYpGiN:m:1:3373497171:BFE3A1AA921BABE18C5EA467AEDDBBD5:r)

Peter,
My race against far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock is going to a RUNOFF.
_**This race is going to decide the future of our country, Peter, and we cannot afford to have any dedicated patriots like you sit on the sidelines.**_
Please, the future of our country is on the line, and we desperately need your support.
If we are going to win on December 6th, **ALL** of our **TOP** supporters need to stand with Senate Republicans and my campaign from now until then. This is ALL OR NOTHING.
Our records indicate that you're in the 95th percentile of active donors in YOUR CITY. With the runoff election soon, we HAVE to keep pace with Raphael Warnock's mega-millionaire donors if we're going to take back our Majority, and that's why we're calling on you, Peter. _Please. We desperately need you when it counts the most._
[_**Contribute $45 or more in the NEXT 20 MINUTES to help us crush our CRITICAL fundraising goal and restore President Trump 's majority in the Senate. >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846055:JnEWYpGtN:m:1:3346849603:79C14F2F2126F8753DAE641CA36C3D50:r)

body:

This can't wait, friend:
**We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
**[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Jacky Rosen so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54457593/378626606/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2222-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjg2MWQ0Ny1lMjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRYLPWM8lD9OyBMp9SYK6XfMAIAzHreVTuC4xyD8Udc=)**
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than **$52 million** to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.
**We need to fight back ASAP , or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
**[Will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54457597/378626611/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2222-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjg2MWQ0Ny1lMjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRYLPWM8lD9OyBMp9SYK6XfMAIAzHreVTuC4xyD8Udc=)**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: To our veterans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Throughout our country’s history, brave men and women across our country have served our nation and risked their lives to protect our freedoms. Today, we honor our veterans for their service and sacrifice. Our veterans’ commitment to keeping us safe and secure is why I’m always pushing to ensure all veterans and their families get the care and benefits they’ve earned. We’re working with nonprofits to get veterans experiencing homelessness the resources they need, and we’re passing laws in Washington, including our _Sgt. Daniel Somers Veterans Network of Support Act_ , to help veterans and servicemembers access critical support as they transition to civilian life. To our veterans: Thank you for your service to our country, I promise to continue my work in the Senate honoring your service and ensuring you receive the care and benefits you’ve earned. Thank you, and have a good Veterans Day. Kyrsten
Sinema for Arizona
P.O. Box 7586
Phoenix, AZ 85011-7586

name: Mark Takano
subject: Standing up for veterans today and everyday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter, today is Veterans Day — a time to honor U.S. military veterans for everything they have sacrificed to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests at home and around the world.

As such, our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve.

As chairman of the Veterans Affairs Committee in the U.S. House, I am so proud to be working around the clock to honor the work of our veterans and make sure that we as a country keep our promises to them.

This Veterans Day, I’m elated to have authored and helped pass the PACT Act — **the single largest benefit expansion of the US Department of Veteran Affairs, ever.**

That means real support and resources in the hands of veterans who need it most.

But the fight never stops. I will keep working to ensure veterans have access to healthcare, housing, and education opportunities, and so much more.

Today and always I am committed to supporting our veterans. I hope you’ll join me on this national holiday in paying respect to our brave veterans.

Sincerely,

Mark Takano | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54458539/378630451/234291150?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20221111_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2FjOTQ1Zi1lNDYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ih0R_DVvUpc-ZaSw8yZGekfmX68cQmGV5yha2rPXXyQ=)

clean_body: | Peter, today is Veterans Day — a time to honor U.S. military veterans for everything they have sacrificed to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests at home and around the world. As such, our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve. As chairman of the Veterans Affairs Committee in the U.S. House, I am so proud to be working around the clock to honor the work of our veterans and make sure that we as a country keep our promises to them. This Veterans Day, I’m elated to have authored and helped pass the PACT Act — the single largest benefit expansion of the US Department of Veteran Affairs, ever. That means real support and resources in the hands of veterans who need it most. But the fight never stops. I will keep working to ensure veterans have access to healthcare, housing, and education opportunities, and so much more. Today and always I am committed to supporting our veterans. I hope you’ll join me on this national holiday in paying respect to our brave veterans. Sincerely, Mark Takano | = | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to .

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Veterans are the heart of our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Team,

Today I want to personally thank our veterans and their families for their service. The significance of their courage, sacrifice, and devotion to this country cannot be measured and cannot be sufficiently honored with one day. But nevertheless, it's still an important opportunity to show our gratitude.

Veterans and their families represent the best of America. They show tremendous bravery and valor in their willingness to enter foreign territory under the most harrowing of circumstances. They show unyielding commitment to our country’s founding principles. And they show an incredible ability to make a real difference in our communities and worldwide.

Treating our veterans with the dignity and honor they deserve is one of our foremost responsibilities. No one who has made such immense sacrifices for our freedom should ever have to wait for care or for a check. That's why I'm always fighting for better healthcare and better jobs for our veterans and their families.

I hope you will join me in honoring our veterans and their families today and every day.

— Eric

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The Left is not letting up…
body:
You have an enormous stake in helping protect the honesty and integrity of American elections...the linchpin of our Republic.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As an informed conservative, you know how Judicial Watch is working hard every day to fight _for_ the rule of law and _against_ public corruption and unlawful government secrecy...regardless of the final outcome of Tuesday's midterm elections!
...and I think you understand that in these fights _every dollar counts_.
[That’s why I urge you to give us your support today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61002&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61002&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

The impact of our work has never been more important.
* **_We continue to be the "only game in town" when it comes to pulling back the curtain of secrecy surrounding Biden family corruption_****.**

The current Congress and the liberal media look the other way, but we continue our investigations and litigation into serious allegations of **Biden family corruption** , centering on the overseas influence-peddling schemes engineered by Hunter that may have benefitted his father, **Joe Biden.**
* **_We continue to be the most effective voice in the country for exposing the use of taxpayer dollars to fund Critical Race Theory (CRT) teaching_**. We forced the release of documents from the Defense Department showing that **CRT** propaganda is being used in classroom materials at the **S. Military Academy (West Point) and the U.S. Naval Academy**. And we recently sued the Defense Department over its failure to release to us records related to the **U.S. Air Force Academy** implementing **CRT** in the training of air force recruits!

* **_And for sure, we continue to be the most effective voice in the country for commonsense safeguards to keep our elections honest_**.

Our successful lawsuits and settlements in states including **California, Florida, Indiana** , **North Carolina** and **Ohio** have helped clean up elections in those states, and we are still pursuing lawsuits against **Colorado** , **New York** and **Pennsylvania**!

The generous support we receive from our supporters are a cornerstone of our patriotic mission...

...and the need for quick Judicial Watch action through the courts frequently arise suddenly and without warning.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61002&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

The Left is not letting up one bit in corruptly using its power to radically transform America...and as our investigations and lawsuits prove, they will use any tool, including unlawful government secrecy and censorship of conservative voices, to achieve their goal.

I can think of no group better able to counter these forces than Judicial Watch!

[Your best gift today will help us respond effectively as we fight for you and for America.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61002&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

Thank you for giving your support to Judicial Watch and all our work.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61002&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

Peter, Every single one of our nation’s defenders deserves to be celebrated today. **Unfortunately, too many of our veterans will not be able to celebrate. Like the 3 of our own Warriors who are rotting in prison. ** Sergeant Calvin Gibbs, Staff Sergeant Robert Bales, and Specialist Neftaly Platero are all currently serving out **LIFE SENTENCES** for crimes they didn't commit. And in honor of Veterans Day, we are asking for your help in getting these heroes the justice they deserve. **[Will you make a contribution to our WARRIOR FUND today?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03330fe18791485b8c7dd23f1964e436&_e=np4O6NDpOPHRPkXORBq-bZwhiLQcSjcIP0mSW7bYKHexr-c3oTf6fNO5LrFd-OPlhbrL1gwoVGgEHgDsSaRsxD6u3_KBoqutVDFfuMlmn_bLD3sZigxC8loxH7aAdY3qML16tl7J8S9XSaJs0d-yO0XoPYgKPyk5OpOMXF5mZ8D3TA01anHqoQ_BjIrJNv20MMhwRnisTjoMWJ1EwOg6c5aJ3phv8-iX-Xffbh-pB9SJcH1zq_Ul66QItEu8KNOU2m_nOJeYt0RZVyX-QFzp63qK-LFmKxRXBOHtZ8ul725dg9yuu1qeZzI9zQgaFKLCdExCNsG1chD9l5cEjKWpNVfvNe5fJaxgCHetcifQNW469B5QtChjR39MfFfXssXtFbX2RK3yx5zhgiug768E7sa53o2cS4VmG7YK8bCAZkogPiawv4ni60EX_Es24GqVDMEy8mUDc0qwFsMn1kD3UQ%3D%3D)**

Peter, we cannot forget our the atrocities committed by our own government, against the men and women who serve! In an effort to wrongly convict these Heroes, the government has...
* Thrown out evidence,
* Disregarded witness testimony,
* Flown in enemy combatants to testify,
* Threatened them with the death sentence,
* And so much more!

**This Veterans Day weekend, we're reminded of the respect that these men are owed for their service.****Yet still, they are treated like second-class criminals. ** _United American Patriots is working to change that. _ Our team at UAP works day and night to get these Warriors free and back into the arms of their loved ones, but we need your help. We step in whenever our Nation’s Warriors are wrongfully accused and convicted of “War Crimes,” and U.S. military prosecutors have failed them. United American Patriots works with families to alleviate the financial burden and to “Defend our Defenders” through our WARRIOR FUND. We pay for fees and associated expenses to ensure our Nation’s Warriors have the best attorneys, investigators, and experts on their side to preserve their rights and defend against wrongful accusations and convictions. **_The reason why is simple: because our Defenders deserve nothing less. _** [**Could you chip in $35 this Veteran's Day to help our country's Heroes get the respect they deserve?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=03330fe18791485b8c7dd23f1964e436&_e=np4O6NDpOPHRPkXORBq-bZwhiLQcSjcIP0mSW7bYKHexr-c3oTf6fNO5LrFd-OPlhbrL1gwoVGgEHgDsSaRsxD6u3_KBoqutVDFfuMlmn_Z3ptCBZtJZuzv1JV2WP1QqFd_-Jh7Weiz0z8zcEMXGkW8WBMUwcwQwjMVr-NFlQNCxt7aKKWSejqJevkSlODTYnWY3tb6a55fhn0Kjw-NjA17Kaed-Vyy9IMJJAFJ-D5eSKPT0TWu_Gv4KuepxCu1ju1KUrLq81T24cPkLseRvBjuThKtD3_ua5OdfsKvYzh8P2Jbs-0b3ZffFU_QX4Exyw7VGvaCIlvx-11e0RhCrzGdpohS2IW7VYC0CU2YeEpjXHZu-xaHbC_j1o4ZZZQfHQBGlvX_Fs4FhllGReGVKGBktPqbugPPNrs6sC55fpJ3WFo2EdXYMqDDi-U5PNmyJK71ULt73Nri99CXZFA5GiSelxXU99JsnVpTHXBjmApA%3D)

The reason why is simple: because our Defenders deserve nothing less. Thank you in advance for your support this Veterans Day weekend. Nick Coffman United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. clean_body: | | | | Did your vote count? Friend, When I woke up this morning I was still thinking to myself, "Who won?" Did elections always take this long? How did Florida tabulate results the same night? Senator Marco Rubio was on Hannity and bewildered that Arizona (and Oregon) look like third-world countries. Needless to say, in Oregon-WE NEED HELP! | I am happy to announce: Help is on the way! Battleground Oregon has entered the good fight with a massive lawsuit to bring accountability to those that run our elections. in response to . Democrat Secretary of State, Shemia Fagan, has no excuses for not tabulating YOUR VOTE in an efficient, timely, and transparent manner. This is the fight of our lifetime: Election Integrity is paramount to the survival of our Republic. Can we count on your support? We humbly ask that you help us reach our goal of $2,500 by tonight. "Things can change, but the time is NOW to take action. Can you chip in?" | | | Thank you for your urgent support,Friend. | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ Battleground Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, OR

name: Herschel Walker
subject: One more chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845059:J_V4upGyN:m:1:3374012347:71985CCE0B2C6BFD3EC80550ADE96087:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845059:J_V4upGyN:m:1:3374012347:71985CCE0B2C6BFD3EC80550ADE96087:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845060:J_V4upGyN:m:1:3374012347:71985CCE0B2C6BFD3EC80550ADE96087:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61845061:J_V4upGyN:m:1:3374012347:71985CCE0B2C6BFD3EC80550ADE96087:r)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Let’s celebrate the service of our veterans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54464408/378637880/-1502561798?refcode=EM_C_221111VeteransDay_H_TEAM_30DO_3_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY1NjVmYi1lYjYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuUGPbxilEzZWNQcIDbGlTh01ldxDu9da-v6qnAE3hs=&emci=09bcdfec-0f61-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=a8f565fb-eb61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=23746811) It’s Veterans Day, Peter.

Today we celebrate the service of those in our armed forces, as well as their dedication to democracy and the America we hold dear. Veterans in this country have given America their absolute all in service, and it’s only right that we treat our veterans with the respect and dignity they deserve.

That’s why I have fought for our veterans in Washington, passing bipartisan legislation to provide veterans with expanded access to preventative health fitness services and receive benefits and healthcare for exposure to toxic burn pits. Our veterans fought for us, and I will always fight for them, too. Together, we must always strive to never forget, or take for granted, the work our veterans do for us every day.

We hope this Veterans Day allows you to reflect on the service our veterans have given to this country. We must treat these heroic Americans fairly for their service in the name of protecting us all. We’re eternally grateful for them and wish them a happy Veterans Day.

Respectfully,

Shontel Brown Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
PO Box 221232
Beachwood, OH 44122
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/SB_jCLuMXEGKMEGQua2C0A2?unsubscribedata=MMDAxwH0cKkmh8h7XsOGHXlbxsHNyxWo%2FTlyjc6depFQ6MhHDrs5A2ZISVmXYKq3Egqhb6XRpXMxYVdzlZNtjcqAPV4ZWohyzlMo%2BplB1fYQE4rHD9eP2OmtGxFr6mfl2h1DBIHWYtY6LJngDzfuTeLh6ylc%2FtDgZr2kg2SBLHdl0BFxS37PHVAZQxENJSPiRABvxYYlYHK9C9NUgg3JTkr1Cr6g2cJYgp4qFydTHMl0hE7LL39lhECYzdjmVtaWtR0Ms0fB9i9LaDcYHnpjYJc1nh4lEC%2BRztq9YZWtGvb5a2ktCD7XJXNnckLtv%2FEO2qJjl7%2BtCrlN0naGlhIN%2BI9sT7kBivqHslOfFVGLIfeqwmDtiWaJ4H1IqOFL8NVYr8SYmzwjqYvyBDwM91hzVea%2FBuVtChl2PlZUHWdUciMurWdEUcbMvnXn1vTvXaRV).

subject: This race isn’t over

body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7560%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FnxiuvyvqK512heNzBOlbQ&sysid=1)
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77096%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XKFrEBq1IVa4qjtDzm3zuw&sysid=1)**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77097%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tLMeXOTg449TRbfDx2RYxA&sysid=1)

[** RUSH $10 → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77099%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FSi%2f5GINZlbTTQV%2bIioV3g&sysid=1)
[** RUSH $34 → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77090%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SqcuKmLyeUGjYCKKnbFtiA&sysid=1)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77091%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4WWvoDAcaJP20D4MCVmhyg&sysid=1)**

Herschel Walker

name: RW
subject: I'm fighting hard to keep Dr. King's dream of justice and equality alive in Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: From a young age, my parents taught me what it meant to be of service to others. My dad was a veteran, small businessman, and preacher. My mom worked hard to raise my siblings and me and instill in us the belief that we could do anything we put our minds to.

Today, I'm proud to serve the people of Georgia in the Senate – but my work doesn't stop there. I serve as the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. **Sometimes folks ask me, "What is it like to walk in Dr. King's shoes?"** I always tell them I've never tried.******We don't need to walk in his shoes; we need to stand on his shoulders and meet today's moment.**

Understanding that my service doesn't stop at the church doors is a big part of why I ran for Senate in the first place. Now, I'm fighting hard to keep Dr. King's dream of justice and equality alive in Washington.
**But I'll be honest: Winning this race is critical to advancing our bold agenda – but all signs point to a dead heat. The only way I can defend my seat and win our critical fights for justice is with your help.[I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more right now to help me keep Georgia blue and build a better future for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54442457/378564847/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4572-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE3YTNhMi1jNTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSrtMiYWOeGo5rnxwhPXJmiEZ447XBpXJOTYwQWzLps=)**

Thank you, friend.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line.

Our country's future is on the line.

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: This Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/U0nJ8BafsU2CW17YM7qqkX2EiskujFVPUuqaHCEIpe0=/AyphVGXhOeJANsp74WJALOADr6Fglet4BE4R9xtEP64=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
This Veterans Day, please join me in thanking our service men and women for their dedication and the many sacrifices they have made to protect our freedoms and defend our great nation.

I am honored to be able to continue my service in Congress including my work on the House Armed Services Committee, and will continue to fight daily on behalf of our servicemembers and veterans to ensure they receive the benefits they deserve, including increased access to VA healthcare services and affordable housing.
Today, I also reflect on my own decision to enlist in the Marine Corps Reserves at age 19. I have never known a greater sense of camaraderie or courage than when serving alongside my fellow men and women in uniform, and I am grateful to have been of service to our country.
Thank you for taking a moment today to join me in recognizing our brave service men and women, and thanking them for all they do for our country.

Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Unite the Country
subject: Our Veterans put their lives on the line for our country’s values.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
Happy Veterans Day!
We want to take this moment to honor each and every American who has faithfully served our nation in the Armed Forces. It’s because of their selfless service that we enjoy the liberty and democracy that we all too often take for granted.
While we can never fully repay our Veterans for what they have done for our country, we live up to the promises we made them.
That’s why we want to recommit to ensuring that all of our Vets and their families have access to good education, health care, and job opportunities when they return home.
Our Vets never gave up on us, and we will never give up on them.
Thanks for all that you do,
Unite the Country
