body:
Missouri voters on Nov. 8 said “yes” to legalizing recreational marijuana, imposing police-related unfunded mandates on Kansas City | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
November 11, 2022
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f5073c8a56&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6c290ea4eb&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=50ee5550b3&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Marijuana legalization tops voter action on ballot measures**
Missouri voters on Nov. 8 said “yes” to legalizing recreational marijuana, imposing police-related unfunded mandates on Kansas City and elevating the Missouri National Guard to departmental status but “no” to relaxing constitutional restrictions on state investments and calling a special convention to rewrite the state constitution.

Amendment 3 legalizes adult marijuana use and possession, provides for automatic expungement of most past non-violent marijuana convictions and establishes industry regulations. It was the most controversial of the five statewide ballot measures, with even many recreational marijuana supporters opposing it because it constitutionally locks in dominance over the industry by existing medical marijuana license holders. In the end, though, 53.1 percent of voters ratified it.

Voters were more supportive of Amendment 4, which creates a four-year window during which the General Assembly can force the Kansas City council to increase police spending. Missouri’s tax-limiting Hancock Amendment currently prohibits lawmakers from imposing unfunded mandates on local governments, but Amendment 4 carves out a loophole to that limit on legislative power. Even though 61.4 percent of Kansas City voters opposed Amendment 4, it won ratification anyway with 63.2 statewide support.

Amendment 5, which creates a new Missouri Department of the National Guard, also won strong support, with 60.2 percent of voters favoring ratification. However, it likely will have little practical impact since the governor already has direct constitutional control over the Guard.

Voters had far less enthusiasm for Amendment 1, which sought to grant lawmakers the power to statutorily override existing constitutional restrictions on how the state treasurer can invest taxpayer funds. It failed with only 45.7 percent in favor.

And voters resoundingly rejected calling a convention to overhaul or replace the Missouri Constitution, with only 32.3 percent in support. The constitutional convention question automatically goes on the statewide ballot every 20 years. This year’s result is similar to the outcomes the previous three times voters decided the question, in 1962, 1982 and 2002. Missouri voters last authorized a convention in 1942. That convention produced the current Missouri Constitution, which has been in use since 1945.
---
|
---
| **Democrats gain three House seats, Schmitt elected to Senate**
Democrats made a net gain of three seats in the Missouri House of Representatives on Nov. 8, while the partisan breakdown remained unchanged in the Senate as Republicans will retain veto-proof supermajorities in both chambers when the 2023 legislation session begins Jan. 4. Republicans are set to outnumber Democrats 111-52 in the House and 24-10 in the Senate.
Topping the ticket in Missouri, Attorney General Eric Schmitt won election to replace U.S. Sen. Roy Blunt, who is retiring after two terms. Schmitt’s win keeps in Republican hands a Senate seat the party has held since Democrat Thomas Eagleton retired in 1986.

Republicans also completed their sweep of Missouri’s six statewide executive branch offices when voters elected State Treasurer Scott Fitzpatrick as state auditor. Fitzpatrick will replace Democrat Nicole Galloway, who didn’t seek re-election to a third term. Galloway had been the only remaining statewide Democrat since 2016, when Republicans claimed the other five posts, which weren’t on the ballot this year.

With Schmitt and Fitzpatrick moving on, Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, will appoint replacements to serve the remainder of their terms as attorney general and state treasurer, which run through 2024.
---
|
---
| **Departing lawmaker picked to head unemployment agency**
Gov. Mike Parson on Nov. 7 appointed departing state Rep. Allen Andrews as director of the Missouri Division of Employment Security, which oversees the state’s unemployment insurance program. Andrews, a Republican, can begin serving right away but faces Senate confirmation when the legislature reconvenes in January.

Andrews, of Grant City, was first elected to the House of Representatives in 2014 and represented the northwesternmost corner of the state. He couldn’t seek re-election this year due to term limits. His seat will remain vacant until January when his newly elected replacement takes office.
---
|
---

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9bbd6cdba8&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5344be9f48&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0911de8655&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

clean_body: Missouri voters on Nov. 8 said “yes” to legalizing recreational marijuana, imposing police-related unfunded mandates on Kansas City | | | | | | | Capitol Report November 11, 2022 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Marijuana legalization tops voter action on ballot measures Missouri voters on Nov. 8 said “yes” to legalizing recreational marijuana, imposing police-related unfunded mandates on Kansas City and elevating the Missouri National Guard to departmental status but “no” to relaxing constitutional restrictions on state investments and calling a special convention to rewrite the state constitution. Amendment 3 legalizes adult marijuana use and possession, provides for automatic expungement of most past non-violent marijuana convictions and establishes industry regulations. It was the most controversial of the five statewide ballot measures, with even many recreational marijuana supporters opposing it because it constitutionally locks in dominance over the industry by existing medical marijuana license holders. In the end, though, 53.1 percent of voters ratified it. Voters were more supportive of Amendment 4, which creates a four-year window during which the General Assembly can force the Kansas City council to increase police spending. Missouri’s tax-limiting Hancock Amendment currently prohibits lawmakers from imposing unfunded mandates on local governments, but Amendment 4 carves out a loophole to that limit on legislative power. Even though 61.4 percent of Kansas City voters opposed Amendment 4, it won ratification anyway with 63.2 statewide support. Amendment 5, which creates a new Missouri Department of the National Guard, also won strong support, with 60.2 percent of voters favoring ratification. However, it likely will have little practical impact since the governor already has direct constitutional control over the Guard. Voters had far less enthusiasm for Amendment 1, which sought to grant lawmakers the power to statutorily override existing constitutional restrictions on how the state treasurer can invest taxpayer funds. It failed with only 45.7 percent in favor. And voters resoundingly rejected calling a convention to overhaul or replace the Missouri Constitution, with only 32.3 percent in support. The constitutional convention question automatically goes on the statewide ballot every 20 years. This year’s result is similar to the outcomes the previous three times voters decided the question, in 1962, 1982 and 2002. Missouri voters last authorized a convention in 1942. That convention produced the current Missouri Constitution, which has been in use since 1945. | | Democrats gain three House seats, Schmitt elected to Senate Democrats made a net gain of three seats in the Missouri House of Representatives on Nov. 8, while the partisan breakdown remained unchanged in the Senate as Republicans will retain veto-proof supermajorities in both chambers when the 2023 legislation session begins Jan. 4. Republicans are set to outnumber Democrats 111-52 in the House and 24-10 in the Senate. Topping the ticket in Missouri, Attorney General Eric Schmitt won election to replace U.S. Sen. Roy Blunt, who is retiring after two terms. Schmitt’s win keeps in Republican hands a Senate seat the party has held since Democrat Thomas Eagleton retired in 1986. Republicans also completed their sweep of Missouri’s six statewide executive branch offices when voters elected State Treasurer Scott Fitzpatrick as state auditor. Fitzpatrick will replace Democrat Nicole Galloway, who didn’t seek re-election to a third term. Galloway had been the only remaining statewide Democrat since 2016, when Republicans claimed the other five posts, which weren’t on the ballot this year. With Schmitt and Fitzpatrick moving on, Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, will appoint replacements to serve the remainder of their terms as attorney general and state treasurer, which run through 2024. | | Departing lawmaker picked to head unemployment agency Gov. Mike Parson on Nov. 7 appointed departing state Rep. Allen Andrews as director of the Missouri Division of Employment Security, which oversees the state’s unemployment insurance program. Andrews, a Republican, can begin serving right away but faces Senate confirmation when the legislature reconvenes in January. Andrews, of Grant City, was first elected to the House of Representatives in 2014 and represented the northwesternmost corner of the state. He couldn’t seek re-election this year due to term limits. His seat will remain vacant until January when his newly elected replacement takes office. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846681:JguuEpGIN:m:1:3331421248:73D6DEB7F2D3504DAE98EA6CF9069F73:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846681:JguuEpGIN:m:1:3331421248:73D6DEB7F2D3504DAE98EA6CF9069F73:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846681:JguuEpGIN:m:1:3331421248:73D6DEB7F2D3504DAE98EA6CF9069F73:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846681:JguuEpGIN:m:1:3331421248:73D6DEB7F2D3504DAE98EA6CF9069F73:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846681:JguuEpGIN:m:1:3331421248:73D6DEB7F2D3504DAE98EA6CF9069F73:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846681:JguuEpGIN:m:1:3331421248:73D6DEB7F2D3504DAE98EA6CF9069F73:r)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert

body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61847172:6WyHEpGN1:m:1:3369487795:479996F82C65B889EE2AD15C58E9E18A:r)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Red Wave?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC

It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zun7kkao66rg1s29ckqeeps127ltrshd5ssfnjcg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr36gpneopmeqq3copgegq37d34s2q7eo76mkpj8t1kecrj4cpjeppr2clgcsoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup70pjgmiqjcdtim5j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

---
Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z93p6bhgsfshvr3i037730euckdp51topt7dgpk8_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbsvp4sko11uu1tusvlsp5t6re9qvq8ank9qmqpg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zados4vdjliit7h1j5omme534tmo8ikcfsbrcung_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdp15psgth2316kl4fgjl1uhv9u68o27ls9dfnp0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmc484biftk3js82gjralrn9c0ir6lpvr472oft8_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc5kf015ku4lcvf54q81l87nehkddjjaolo0hh2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcdts42p4t4bhmvsuh1vt1ch3hubb7qmbog5odd8_rp22sh2s8i66or0shiecoj4cph2bs)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: This race is too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We are launching an emergency Make it Count Fund in order to respond to any legal challenges from National Republicans.
#

Friends —
Our race is too close to call at the moment. Ballots are still being counted, and we're slightly ahead, but election analysts are unable to project who will win.
That’s why we’re launching an emergency Make it Count Fund in order to respond to the conspiracies and legal challenges that are coming our way. But we’re counting on your support to make sure we have the resources we need to fight.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our Make it Count Fund right now to help us fight back? I need your support as votes continue to be counted in this race that could determine who controls the Senate.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov22.ftVLpg&refcode=em221111-1-7&t=1&akid=4759%2E6688874%2E_wZdYh)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Deters?=
subject: It's time for Mitch's reckoning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Deters for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2a77f45cdc&e=fdefed58de)
Peter, the midterms are now over and we have much to discuss about the results.Was there a massive red wave? No, not really.Was there a great amount of Republican victory? Yes, yes there was.But, the part that we really need to discuss is that the counting of these votes in swing states is a joke. As I write this email to you guys, we still have states counting votes.We still don’t know the election results from Nevada, Arizona or even key races in Colorado.It’s a joke, to be frank. Our nation is the richest on earth but our elections are run like a third-world sham country.That’s one of the many reasons I’m running for Governor - many thought my race was this week, but our race is actually in 2023. We’re still fighting hard to win our primary and that’s why I’m writing to you today.
| [HELP ERIC WIN BACK THE KENTUCKY GOVERNORSHIP!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=008cf44e18&e=fdefed58de)
---
It might shock you if you’re not from Kentucky, but our red state has a Democrat governor.Why is that? Our GOP is controlled by Mitch McConnell and keeps running McConnell acolytes to try and oust him.Even though we all know that, people keep telling me that if I want to win I have to kiss Mitch McConnel’s ring.Personally, I think Mitch McConnell needs to retire from politics and stay out of our business.If that isn’t how politics works, tough. I’m not here to fake.They say I won't be able to get the funding to win the primary or general without Mitch McConnell... I call bullshit.The American people are sick and tired of the political establishment, and with this race being a chance to stick it to him and show him his influence isn’t everything, I know I’ll have their support!So, today, now that the midterms are basically over, we’re the team to support if you want to see some more conservative victories.My primary is coming up in a few months, but I have to raise the money now to be able to win it - and as I told you, I don’t plan on kissing up to the establishment to do it.**So, if you want a constitutional conservative outsider to beat the RINO establishment and be the Ron DeSantis of Kentucky, I need you to send me your most generous donation today!**
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $25.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e1c83a3396&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $50.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0f993dedb9&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $100.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b6b5d7feb0&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [STICK IT TO THE ESTABLISHMENT $1,000.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ce8f3c8594&e=fdefed58de)
---
A strong Governor can make a difference not just in their state - but in the entire nation. Just look at how Ron DeSantis has inspired the nation through his work in Florida. I aim to fight as hard as Ron DeSantis. I am another candidate in the mold of Kari Lake and others, and I’ll govern as a Constitutional Conservative.We will set an example for the country so people can see what TRUE liberty looks like.
You know that we can’t let Mitch get his way. He is desperate to keep me out of the Governor’s office because he knows I would stand up to weak-kneed RINOs who have sold out Kentucky and this country.Sincerely,Eric Deters
|
---
Paid for by Eric Deters for Governor

Fellow American,

Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line.

Our country's future is on the line.

**AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e320d36763054b56a63eb30eb55fb1df&_e=54p4rc5wltskMwq6hwgnwG29vxGxrEoczjVGkSBZTmnnt2JLKAPLtTZm6SFePGBXhtt2B3Ea-X_etHdnMHW2__nglCF0xlQV7fgBO7A9lVpBCGFCD7AiI_u0fJK4SNSIVOM6Nlv8IWSlbClUGCzxARbEwjGRO_06SFsgOy7NoEiiC24yk8CaCDdCrp8oxkMi3YdqP9KoZfs2FtB0kEwGi9hcqzQkdDqZmXzP1R27HsZIuxSbfgU83nMX1iwrV6YlN3Gh_TgJKrhA2v4uecnV6TQ-LJXLqqv8NNesS9TVqZl0yMpcAmrNWNl7qSrgYRg593GVVm0k6_mpnrtGihJmc7EfpDWdPthXomLBRPTHGZ0wY-M1nw8BjOp2UwBb6ol7Ea5EYVbtUYDi4YWz9evw6k1dWA9hMzJOZVLtMAW3694BoMm7QOlZ-n-XJ03hEcH23V499maSpUQjP8mD3dJW_w%3D%3D)

clean_body: If you want to save America, I need your help. | Fellow American, Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line. Our country's future is on the line. AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN. Fellow American, you and I both know our country is on the wrong track. But if Senator Warnock is re-elected and Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we will get more of the same: more inflation, more crime, more open borders, more woke policies, and more support for the disastrous Biden agenda. I'm fired up for this runoff election and ready to get America back on track, but I can't do it alone. I need your help. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:

|

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3pum9fopp9j2o1opq2dv1qa51v85ei523i9i950_rp22sh2s8i66or0shie2p31c1h2bs) **

[** Donate $34 -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4p3ku57i8g6fonrvbjirvjq76orj0ocvnvc2df0_rp22sh2s8i66or0shie2p31c1h2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkjl7bf7oe6cg5l295b13a2cl7v9qoudbuh1s4bg_rp22sh2s8i66or0shie2p31c1h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt83hfnuphcfvinjnu5naeirh39kmfaktcg2i0ag_rp22sh2s8i66or0shie2p31c1h2bs)**

Thank you,

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Friend, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter,

I believe in common sense.
I believe in low taxes.
I believe in limited government.

**And I believe in doing everything in my power to restore the American Dream** and putting hardworking Americans first so that we will leave for our children what they deserve to inherit: **the greatest country in the history of the world.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7563%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=yvEMVrrOn8GZRgEetJxrkg&sysid=1)
|
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77015%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WiX2PsUSkmp6LgmyDsvmHQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77016%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=syHyDrncUJU73yb4MfzY0A&sysid=1) **

[** Donate $5 → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77017%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zotugbo5Ln3vcFMqVC%2b8vw&sysid=1)
[** Donate $15 → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77018%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QlN%2fTIxOxQqI5edPLqSmYA&sysid=1)
[** Donate $34 → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77019%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l0qFdLnuX8hOa28QHQEhDw&sysid=1)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 24 days?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77010%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=piFAJdVcALQCoVuC%2b4uV5g&sysid=1)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77011%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s0nUmKxcYIlMhAsLeLgpSw&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77012%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hw7ViNhmqsCAg%2fjrHL9mzQ&sysid=1)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Mafxdh2UQPHwOWjdnL1YA&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77014%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3D0BvRNMJf9uUIpN766lxQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77025%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Sn6trHxAeIAVQrdepVpHg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hFr13XwY4wdHrKSQ0xd7fg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77027%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lDDDRoRAn%2bHZLmb5zy5wmw&sysid=1)

Our team is working around the clock to pick up _every single_ Fry yard sign across the Grand Stand and Pee Dee — but we need your help.

If you have a sign or see a sign we missed, please bring them to the closest drop-off location listed below.

**Myrtle Beach**
Myrtle Beach Victory Office — 601 19th AVE N Myrtle Beach, SC 29577

**Conway**
Journey Church — 2583 Main Street Conway, SC 29526

**Florence**
Florence Victory Office — 1619 S Irby Street Florence, SC 29505

If you aren't close to any of these options, respond to this email, and we will send someone to come and pick them up from you.

The Fry Team

body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61847180:JwUXVpGWN:m:1:3370555685:22209523921805DA93C960F8AD484B41:r)**

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

| _Thank you for your continued support of The Collective PAC, Peter._

Thanks to supporters like you, we’re building Black political power across the country at all levels of government.

[We’re on a mission to elect Black progressive champions like Stacey Abrams, Raphael Warnock, Val Demings, and MORE in 2022, but it’s going to take every single one of us to do it. name: Seth Moulton
subject: Serve America Updated Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20221111_SA_midterms [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20221111_SA_midterms]

Friend,

Tuesday, Serve America [https://serveamericapac.com/] -endorsed Democrats from across the country defied expectations. 14 of our 17 incumbent members are on track to win. In the 7 endorsed challenger races that have been called, 5 of our candidates won. They prevailed in some of the toughest races in the country , proving our theory: a new generation of leaders makes our country better—and they win.
In January 2021, Serve America was the first leadership PAC to cut checks and we didn’t stop hustling for our candidates until the polls closed yesterday. With your generosity, we raised and gave over $2.5 million to support these servant leaders on the front lines of our democracy.
Colleagues like Abigail Spanberger in Virginia, Lauren Underwood in Illinois, and Jahana Hayes in Connecticut held onto the seats we helped them win in 2018. And I can’t wait to work with newly-elected Serve America colleagues like Chris Deluzio of Pennsylvania and Hillary Scholten of Michigan.
These victories show that there is a strong demand for leaders able to unify our country—leaders who can connect with a diverse group of Americans, and who know how to get things done. Extremists would have us believe that it’s all about yelling the loudest, tweeting the most outrageous, or dividing “us and them.” But that view was sent packing this week—not gone forever, for sure, but set back by quality leaders and the American people.
After four tours with the Marines, I’m not afraid of bipartisanship. I created 988—the new, nationwide mental health hotline, which is already saving thousands of lives—with a Republican who’s a fellow vet.
That’s what this is all about: doing the work of the American people. Working for you.
Please see our results summary below.
Thank you again,
Congressman Seth Moulton

body:

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf0sp9acj9cdlgcft6bfb8448tgh5pvg29epep3o_rp22sh2s8i66or0shie6o74cdh2bs)**

name: Team Malliotakis
subject: Today, we honor those who served
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York
body:
Happy Veterans Day

|
---
Friend,

Happy Veterans Day.

Today, we honor those who fought for our country, for our freedoms, for our families, and for our democracy.

It is because of our veterans and the sacrifices they made that we live in the greatest country in the world.

**We must never forget those who fought to protect our freedoms, our democratic institutions, and our shared values.**
Those who have served our country represent the best among us. We are forever indebted to the countless brave Americans who fought to protect and defend this great nation.

_On today and every day, may we show our utmost appreciation, respect, and gratitude for our veterans._

Sincerely,

Team Malliotakis

|
**A No-Nonsense Leader for Congress.**

* * *

_Congresswoman Malliotakis is the daughter of immigrants, her father from Greece and her mother a Cuban exile of the Castro dictatorship.

She is currently the only Republican member of Congress representing New York City and the only Hispanic Republican elected official citywide._

| Paid for by Nicole for New York
---

Nicole for New York (Federal)
P.O. Box 60487
Staten Island, NY 10306

name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: Burt Jones Congratulates New Senate Caucus Leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 11, 2022
BURT JONES CONGRATULATES NEW SENATE CAUCUS LEADERSHIP
JACKSON, Ga - Today, following the Senate Caucus elections, Lieutenant Governor-elect Burt Jones offered his congratulations to the new caucus leadership. The caucus also voted unanimously to maintain the current Lieutenant Governor power structure. Senator John F. Kennedy was elected Senate President Pro Tempore, Senator Steve Gooch was elected Majority Leader, Senator Jason Anavitarte was elected Caucus Chair, and Senator Randy Robertson was elected Caucus Whip. Burt is excited about the unity and leadership represented by the caucus and is eager to hit the ground running alongside them to deliver big wins for Georgia families.
---
|
---
| |
---
| Following the elections, Lieutenant Governor-elect Burt Jones said, "I want to congratulate our new Senate President Pro Tempore Senator John F. Kennedy, our new Majority Leader Senator Steve Gooch, our new Caucus Chair Senator Jason Anavitarte, and our new Caucus Whip Senator Randy Robertson. Together, they are outstanding and principled leaders who will guide our caucus to new heights. Working together, we're going to create more opportunities that lift up every Georgian and make our state the best place to live, work and raise a family-- and I look forward to accomplishing big things alongside them."
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |

name: Team AOC Field Team
subject: Working 24/7, 365
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Elections may be cyclical, but our campaign is not.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221111-3609-header&t=1&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)
Midterm Election Day 2022 was a lot of things. We were overjoyed to see Alexandria elected to her third term, and while not every other race went the way we’d hoped, Tuesday was an undeniably strong showing for the progressive movement across the country. But let’s zoom out for a second, before you mentally switch out of election mode...
**Team AOC is a campaign that does not live or die by election seasons.**
_What does that mean?_
[If you’re already familiar with all the untraditional work our campaign does, you can rush a donation right now!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221111.iABMDy&refcode=em20221111-3609-P_FND_ANO_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221111.iABMDy&refcode=em20221111-3609-P_FND_ANO_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)**
**But if you haven’t heard the ways Team AOC has NY-14’s back all year long, read on...**
Typically, a campaign is the engine that runs a politician’s bid for elected office. And we certainly do plenty of work on the ground to ensure Alexandria stays in office as long as she needs to. **But we aren’t a traditional campaign, and we know that’s part of why you’re here.**
During the pandemic, we ran a food distribution program that lasted for over a year. We organized a Census outreach program in 2020 that helped New Yorkers keep a congressional seat during redistricting. We’ve run a Homework Helpers program since 2020 that tutors students in our district. Each August and September we give out thousands of backpacks to support families going back to school. We host community forums in the district to get direct feedback from constituents. And much more!
Our campaign lives in NY-14, working hard every day to soak up everything we see and hear from constituents. A lot of campaigns function as machines to generate votes every few years, going dormant when there isn’t a need for fundraising or votes.
**But in addition to all the programs we run locally, we like to think of Team AOC as a permanent suggestion box that funnels the wants and needs of district residents back to AOC’s office in Washington.**
[Fundraising always sags after Election Day because people assume the campaign is “over.” But our campaign sources direct feedback from the district and funds crucial local programs all year long. Can you chip in $3 today to help us maintain this important work?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221111.iABMDy&refcode=em20221111-3609-P_FND_ANO_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221111.iABMDy&refcode=em20221111-3609-P_FND_ANO_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)**
We kicked butt organizing for this year’s midterms, and it’s a relief to return to the district and continue to build out Team AOC’s influence across NY-14 and the country. Let’s keep at it together!
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221111?refcode=em20221111-3609-P_FND_ANO_GFM&t=24&refcode2=3609_2526796_LLyfqW&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221111-3609-P_FND_ANO_GFM&t=25&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=3609%2E2526796%2ELLyfqW)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Thanks to your incredible outpouring of
donations, we overcame hundreds of millions of dollars in dark money to
defeat Dr. Oz in PA and stop a MAGA takeover of the Senate.

If it weren't for your support, there is no way we would have been able to
mobilize our 267,000 supporters in PA. Without our massive targeted
campaign, we would have woken up on Wednesday to a much darker political
reality.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8005?t=1011&akid=3723%2E5885482%2EnGgHYC ]However, to keep the Senate, we still have more work to do. With the
Georgia runoff in less than a month, can we count on you to rush a
donation to help scale up our get-out-the-vote program? We raised turnout
by 11% per voter contact in the 2020 runoff election, so every gift will
significantly increase our chances of victory!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7994?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221111_1_7&t=1012&akid=3723%2E5885482%2EnGgHYC ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7995?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221111_1_7&t=1013&akid=3723%2E5885482%2EnGgHYC ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

America’s most authoritarian billionaires are pouring millions into
Georgia to spread disinformation, suppress voters, and trick folks into
voting against their economic interests.

That's why our organizers are working around the clock to communicate with
voters and ensure that everyone has the information they need to overcome
voter suppression tactics and knows what's at stake for their pocketbooks
and personal freedom.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8005?t=1018&akid=3723%2E5885482%2EnGgHYC ]Can we count on you to chip in now to help us scale up our organizing
work in Georgia in the final weeks before the December 6 runoff?

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

body:

[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfspi112nj9lmc77tem86kgupnppp0cvh06hukvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1dj2epgn6dr7m5qbfc9j6qqb8pjkmjhm2o3k6li61p3le9hr2o30s5g62dhjcsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojed9hcur60phgmiqjcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm1oj0c1i69pj24no)

|
---
| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zorbe6b80oom122ea03ajkp0cb7oj5h7givd3ehg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf7e9qp9c9votasln6ugk54hgbl1ptitkakvic7g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs69phug4o3tbr11ctd1u2jigqdqi9t4duo4i35g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z75isq1hrpmp9u8tuqrlg355too7hgr67oi2iql0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $10")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z44ufngdn1ia96c1jr57dgpmllpclb42006at0t0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $25")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpa05ijnvgo6cmqd65nh2qu1cviv550ii6v45r7g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $50")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpknop3et7a1f7co4q72p79kfm1gbk84i3fsftbo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $100")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgku11fg5grohv6h19eu5bj1dsur583jioul7aho_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $250")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6go7kpm42q0b7ki43t6oovsuuais8c265lievn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6uqgdhia0lj0gko663gi838qgdd3ifpvkk98b6g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0lf6j304ksh3cgdlci4en1e2dfoen1t7b7f8r8g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s9g60p34sph2bs)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Rev. Warnock Alert
subject: Your support will be crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
to keeping Georgia blue!

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54453646/378610731/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU3YmY3Ny1kOTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-8G1RHBCv6d-K1lQ_KyDGsI5HINzs3Ohh-sJpi_jmI=&emci=a5befa3c-7960-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=2de7bf77-d961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

Rev. Warnock is advancing to a runoff, proving once again that Georgia is the key to the Democratic majority.

We have another chance to hold onto our critical Senate majority – but we need YOUR help.

name: Katie Britt
subject: Thank You to Those Who Serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Happy Veterans Day | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=7016d381441949c79d1a8f4d772a7116&_e=pCGEjNq61Pv4y_rSdl92k0OT2EmUINgHkTo-TVOC0TBNRRawE4y4q7wlN22w6bPQSRZlPn5Z1yPmGIMwCPEfRtaY6CWOLVGP1rZq_7rYW_WScxNyCkehIEfNBozyBvLpEDPg7t7l47oWg7vBqMbhAB4A1n8Ove-rZrjqPlEnIcBgIBKV56J6jpXrSHQNtfQOX8ERPCx7HscJEm84MXMnlHF0zBpeywItiU8w0yvM4h1b35LsS3f4Tg7k9cJNhrUHOJJFLBPDV33Dio0bgUkm2eCiQP2KoGTBVFnuf2s74Isw1uAzoJg5sZKNrR2idvkMtgtU3kYn08JdEwasL5XrGugnwxfVi15qW8sbMlpCwiDRflvKVKYh0cjIrgjosSdMP55anlMRCR9V1x-M78gDinq_PhYhuA8Sav9AG_NHbJ8%3D)

Peter, Today may be the day we’ve set aside to honor all our Veterans who have so faithfully served our nation, but these amazing men and women deserve our gratitude and prayers every day. Wesley, Bennett, Ridgeway and I are so grateful for the dedication these courageous patriots have shown each and every day to serve and protect our nation. Words cannot express the awe and appreciation I have for you and your families. Not only have you served faithfully, but your families served as well. While our veterans are serving at home or abroad, their families are supporting the mission from behind the scenes, running to little league games, dance rehearsals and planning family holidays. Wesley and I have always taught Bennett and Ridgeway to honor our veterans and stand for our flag and the values that the flag represents. _For your service and sacrifice, thank you from the bottom of my heart._ Join me in thanking all of our courageous Veterans. [**I’ve created a thank you card that you can sign here >>**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=7016d381441949c79d1a8f4d772a7116&_e=pCGEjNq61Pv4y_rSdl92k0OT2EmUINgHkTo-TVOC0TBNRRawE4y4q7wlN22w6bPQSRZlPn5Z1yPmGIMwCPEfRtaY6CWOLVGP1rZq_7rYW_WScxNyCkehIEfNBozyBvLpEDPg7t7l47oWg7vBqMbhAB4A1n8Ove-rZrjqPlEnIcBgIBKV56J6jpXrSHQNtfQOX8ERPCx7HscJEm84MXMnlHF0zBpeywItiU8w0yvM4h1b35LsS3f4Tg7k9cJNhrUHOJJFLBPDV33Dio0bgUkm2c4NvKM4bjv9s3ey4QuHg4hTOGntgNRBoOXundv9gEHazPUFSIsOpLnrTgVdnpeuvXnNfBDfIqs1yvEqNkdpIk9_UVtsM1mr9yOcC2o2zkd3nYLl2ACNq7BlS_P7AerKu5vL0mloZA0UBoDIHWFtiiY%3D) Thank you,

name: TN House Democrats
subject: Let's celebrate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
In case you missed it, the Tennessee House and Senate Democrats came out victorious on election day--in spite of the Republicans best gerrymandered efforts. Not only did we retain 100% of our caucus, we're also welcoming new members, including Ronnie Glynn from Clarksville and Charlane Oliver, Justin Jones and Caleb Hemmer from Nashville. These candidates won their extremely competitive races and we're grateful for their perseverance. Because of your support, we were able to make significant investments in their races. THANK YOU!
If we want to continue to make headway in the state legislature, we have to work between elections.The role of the Tennessee Legislative Democrats is to identify, train, and support Democratic candidates so we can continue to build our membership. Now that the 2022 midterms are behind us, we're working toward 2024.
We hope you will join us for our Winter Cocktail Event in Nashville on December 15th. We will debrief this past cycle, talk strategy for the new cycle and enjoy good company.
RSVP here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wintercocktailevent] or by emailing tara@triumphstrategies.com. [tara@triumphstrategies.com?subject=TN%20Leg%20Dem%20Oct%2010th%20RSVP]
Gratefully,
-TN Legislative Democrats

|

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

subject: Top Story on Fox News: RAZOR THIN lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r)

|
---
| | | Dear Peter --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $35 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>")

| [URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r "URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61846716:JYzZ-pGEN:m:1:3253819041:180771412833D628BD44A4DFC7E6BF7E:r)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Happy Veterans Day!
body:
Today is Veterans Day, and in honor of all those who have served our nation, I want to thank every one of our heroes.
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jk-GFII5IpzUHdxMpgeNk9iqJJoQ0O43joJibCl4y8immfhpflfwM0nxHRHiv0IWuLdEjsdiSF1pIOnEJBwU9RaiRoHVYZjwHSB1MoFKBOCp6ei-mRRpfGWMFtVxbW5inpUWHtkMxxIbRZkPLO99-4RFflCPKDrp&c=AD9pbccrrMuQFqWt07QIybT54ygmLva1kjzvEgcoB1NFVSwpV5UNQA==&ch=uADaEHoh9FTnFSJ7wAU0Js_RD5M7pP1DrxhI8mzseMPEMbCUKrCkCg==)

| Friend
Today is Veterans Day, and in honor of all those who have served our nation, I want to thank every one of our heroes.
Our Veterans are among the very best our nation has to offer. They answered the call of duty and served our country heroically, ensuring that we could sleep safely at home, knowing our nation's enemies were kept far from our shores.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jk-GFII5IpzUHdxMpgeNk9iqJJoQ0O43joJibCl4y8immfhpflfwM0nxHRHiv0IWuLdEjsdiSF1pIOnEJBwU9RaiRoHVYZjwHSB1MoFKBOCp6ei-mRRpfGWMFtVxbW5inpUWHtkMxxIbRZkPLO99-4RFflCPKDrp&c=AD9pbccrrMuQFqWt07QIybT54ygmLva1kjzvEgcoB1NFVSwpV5UNQA==&ch=uADaEHoh9FTnFSJ7wAU0Js_RD5M7pP1DrxhI8mzseMPEMbCUKrCkCg==)

| To the veterans who have served this country and made countless sacrifices to protect our freedoms and liberty, we thank you and honor you today.
For America's Veterans,

subject: They aren’t able to celebrate Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
You can help our nation’s defenders who won’t get to celebrate this year... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a31f60f9b4&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, Every single one of our nation’s defenders deserves to be celebrated today. **Unfortunately, too many of our veterans will not be able to celebrate. Like the 3 of our own Warriors who are rotting in prison.** Sergeant Calvin Gibbs, Staff Sergeant Robert Bales, and Specialist Neftaly Platero are all currently serving out **LIFE SENTENCES** for crimes they didn't commit. And in honor of Veterans Day, we are asking for your help in getting these heroes the justice they deserve. [**Will you make a contribution to our WARRIOR FUND today?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4d742f8a16&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**VETERAN’S DAY DONATION: $100**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=18d58b270d&e=fdefed58de)
---

---
[**VETERAN’S DAY DONATION: $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dcc6cd8c10&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**VETERAN’S DAY DONATION: $35**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e590c384bf&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, we cannot forget our the atrocities committed by our own government, against the men and women who serve! In an effort to wrongly convict these Heroes, the government has...
* Thrown out evidence,
* Disregarded witness testimony,
* Flown in enemy combatants to testify,
* Threatened them with the death sentence,
* And so much more!

**This Veterans Day weekend, we're reminded of the respect that these men are owed for their service.****Yet still, they are treated like second-class criminals.** _United American Patriots is working to change that._ Our team at UAP works day and night to get these Warriors free and back into the arms of their loved ones, but we need your help. We step in whenever our Nation’s Warriors are wrongfully accused and convicted of “War Crimes,” and U.S. military prosecutors have failed them. United American Patriots works with families to alleviate the financial burden and to “Defend our Defenders” through our WARRIOR FUND. We pay for fees and associated expenses to ensure our Nation’s Warriors have the best attorneys, investigators, and experts on their side to preserve their rights and defend against wrongful accusations and convictions. **_The reason why is simple: because our Defenders deserve nothing less._** [**Could you chip in $35 this Veteran's Day to help our country's Heroes get the respect they deserve?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b045e62107&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**CHIP IN NOW**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8266e06381&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you in advance for your support this Veterans Day weekend. Nick Coffman United American Patriots

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to a runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters . body:

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848237:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848238:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848239:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848240:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848237:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848237:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848237:699hdpGNt:m:1:3331703221:255B44971EE0CB10CA1451DA4B592B8E:r)

Herschel Walker

[](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=d2a56f6a46&e=638e6c2751)
# _Thank you for your vote._
|
---
## To my loyal supporters,
# Again I cannot thank you enough for the encouragement and belief in my campaign this last year. Between my incredible volunteer team, your financial contributions, your messages of support and love, I feel like we were on the journey together!And we are still on that journey. I want to make sure everyone knows that the counties are STILL processing ballots and will be for a while longer. While it is frustrating to say the least that our state has decided to NOT prioritize an efficient electoral process (and that is putting it kindly) we have to keep the faith that the numbers we see now in all the local and state races are not set in stone yet.
#
Please standby with our campaign as we await further number updates from the four counties of CD18. Continue to follow us on social media, and stay tuned for further emails.
**God Bless You!****Peter**
|

clean_body: The fight continues. Thank you for your vote! | | | | Thank you for your vote. | To my loyal supporters, Again I cannot thank you enough for the encouragement and belief in my campaign this last year. Between my incredible volunteer team, your financial contributions, your messages of support and love, I feel like we were on the journey together!And we are still on that journey. I want to make sure everyone knows that the counties are STILL processing ballots and will be for a while longer. While it is frustrating to say the least that our state has decided to NOT prioritize an efficient electoral process (and that is putting it kindly) we have to keep the faith that the numbers we see now in all the local and state races are not set in stone yet. Please standby with our campaign as we await further number updates from the four counties of CD18. Continue to follow us on social media, and stay tuned for further emails. God Bless You!Peter | Tune in to hear more from Peter on Instagram Live: | For most accurate polling updates visit: | | Reminder: Please help us pick up Hernandez for Congress signs! If you see a sign, feel free to pick it up or contact our campaign team & let us know where you saw it. We will be out in the community collecting yard signs. Thank you for your help! | There is still opportunity to support Hernandez for Congress — | | | | | | | Stay in the loop with campaign updates by clicking the LinkTree below! | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Peter Hernandez for Congress. | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Peter Hernandez for Congress, All rights reserved. MEKU, The dust continues to settle since Tuesday’s election. As always, there are reasons to fume and reasons to celebrate, and we are trying to wrap our arms around it all... **** We’ve been hard at work with our partners regionally and across Turtle Island on 2 frontline-led virtual events NEXT WEEK for you to get updated on the shifting political landscape as it relates to MVP and the next phase of the fight against the Manchin-Schumer dirty deal. **** **Virtual Climate Action Party: Stop the Mountain Valley Pipeline - Again!** Tuesday, Nov 15th at 7pm EST **** Crystal is one of the impacted community members and longtime climate activists leading this discussion and digital action to help stop the Mountain Valley Pipeline and support frontline communities.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Election Lessons
body:
Lessons from a Disappointing Election It has taken me a couple of days to evaluate Tuesday's election. In many ways, it was disappointing for conservatives because we were expecting a red wave and | |
---

| | | Lessons from a Disappointing Election |
---|---|---
| It has taken me a couple of days to evaluate Tuesday's election. In many ways, it was disappointing for conservatives because we were expecting a red wave and we only got a red splash. Honestly, I spent most of Wednesday morning somewhat depressed and working on my family's financial plan that protects us from a socialist/communist regime. But I came across a Facebook post from the late-great Rush Limbaugh that helped me get out of the doldrum of despair.[Rush reminded me](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/oVnUpmKLt457tBA33tDjSg), “It is never time to panic. It is never time to give up on America!” Rush is right. It also drew me to some of the lessons I learned from George Washington. I read a lot about Washington, his refusal to give up when everything was stacked against him inspires me to keep moving. Washington spent 8 long years leading a war against an unbeatable foe with an inadequate army, a newly formed nation that had no money and a congress who actively sought to replace him for political reasons.But Washington never gave up, he never quit and he always remained civil, determined and sure of his direction.This country is too good, too important to the world, and its survival is too important to our children and grandchildren's future. Even if the majority of our fellow citizens don't understand its importance, we do not have the luxury of giving up. We cannot stop, we cannot quit.If quitting is not an option, then we must lick our wounds, stand up again and evaluate what happened in Tuesday's election.The people of Hernando, MS overwhelmingly killed a tax increase that had been proposed by the Mayor and Aldermen of their city. The local politicians called in all their favors from surrounding politicians in an attempt to discredit and belittle anyone who opposed their liberal tax and spending policy, but the people saw through their lies and killed the tax increase.**The Lesson: There is still hope that citizens can and will go to the polls and demand conservative policy.** If you plan to challenge the liberal policies, you had better be a real challenge. Citizens will not waste their time on Liberal light or RINO candidates. Dr. Oz lost to an invalid, but Oz was not a conservative. He was simply not a socialist/communist, but even that wasn't enough for folks to care. On the other hand, DeSantis easily won in Florida because he enacted and promoted real conservative policies. He does not speak the establishment double-talk, he actually enacts conservative policy. Mitch McConnell said "people will vote for us simply because we are not democrats". He was wrong. Citizens expect politicians to actually have a plan, to believe in something. **The Lesson: Citizens will turn out and vote for conservative candidates if they are true and real. Not simply because they aren't the other side.** There is reason to be hopeful. It is likely Republicans have gained control of the House of Representatives, which means the House Freedom Caucus has an opportunity to move our nation in a positive, conservative direction. The House Freedom Caucus has been the voice for positive change in our nation, since its creation by Mark Meadows and Jim Jordan and now has the opportunity to make substantive changes to fight Biden's socialist agenda.If you are dependent on your 401K or other investments, then you should be concerned. If you understand the history of the world and know that communism and socialism mean death to a nation and millions of people suffering, then you should be concerned. If you believe in freedom and liberty to live your life and worship God is important, then you should be concerned.But, like Washington, you also understand that a nation based on freedom and liberty, a nation based on capitalism, is worth fighting for. It is worth whatever sacrifice we must make to leave our children and grandchildren a nation where they can succeed.Remember, “It is never time to give up on America!”

|
|
* * *
| The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi.
| Mississippi Freedom Caucus
530 George Street, Suite 200
Jackson, MS 39202
www.FreedomCaucus.ms
662-469-6242
info@freedomcaucus.ms
---|---

You are currently subscribed to a mailing list of Mississippi Freedom Caucus. If you wish to unsubscribe, please click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Oqf6puuSkcqt9UmgB743MQ).
[](https://www.votervoice.net)

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: An update on my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
As we have seen in previous elections, it takes time to count every vote from every county. This process takes diligence.
| Folks,

I want to start by saying thank you for your support throughout our entire campaign.

As of right now, our race is currently too close to call. There are still ballots coming in and the margins are too close for anything to be called at this point.

**County election officials are hard at work tabulating those votes. And they’re going to be tabulating them for the next few days.**

I know we’re all eager to find out who won each of these incredibly important races, but we will need to be patient and wait for every vote to be counted. **Because every single vote matters, and every single vote counts equally — whether you voted by mail, dropped off your ballot at a secure drop box, or voted in person.**

[**That’s why our focus is now turning to ballot curing — contacting voters who may have had an issue with their ballots — to make sure all voices are heard in this race. Can you split any amount between my campaign and Voter Protection Project now to assist in our ballot curing efforts and ensure every vote is properly counted?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33575?t=6&akid=5340%2E878179%2EKGuNRN) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Katie Hobbs and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33576?t=7&akid=5340%2E878179%2EKGuNRN)

We know my opponent and her allies have been sowing doubt and confusion throughout this campaign, and it’s unacceptable that they were spreading misinformation this week while people were exercising their right to vote.

I have every confidence that the counties administering this election conducted a free and fair election, and their results will be accurate. But they will take time, so prepare for a few more days of counting.

Thanks for everything, and more soon.

— Katie

(www.protectvoting.org)

When I left my role as UN ambassador, I made a promise to keep standing for America. People like you have helped me deliver on this promise. Our movement has grown to more than 2 million Americans strong. And, we’re just getting started. If we want to preserve the American Dream and uphold our nation’s values, then we have to continue supporting bold conservatives across America. That’s why I’ve spent the past two years crisscrossing the country, helping more than 60 conservatives win their elections.
