name: Val Demings
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I want you to be proud today
| | |
---
Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. This isn't the result we had hoped for, but I still want you to be proud of what we've accomplished together.
Since I launched this campaign, grassroots supporters have shown up in droves. Over 760,000 people like you have chipped in. We have outraised Marco Rubio every single fundraising quarter. And together, we have built an unprecedented people-powered movement to flip Florida blue. I'm astounded by your passion, drive and generosity.
So, even though we didn't come out on top this time, I want to say thank you. Thank you for sticking with me through all of the joys and pains of this race. Thank you for dreaming of a better future with me. And thank you for believing that a poor Black girl from Jacksonville can grow up to become a U.S. senator.
And let me tell you something: Having grown up in the segregated South, I'm no stranger to challenges. It wasn't easy to become the first in my family to graduate college or Orlando's first female chief of police. I never gave up then – and while I'm disappointed by the result of this race, I'm certainly not discouraged now. And you shouldn't be either, friend.
Across the country, ballots are still being counted to determine the size of our Democratic Senate caucus – and I have full faith that Senate Democrats will continue to deliver for the American people. While this Senate campaign has come to an end, the story of what's next has just begun. With people like you supporting Democratic ideals, I know this next chapter will be filled with greatness.
I'll leave you with a lesson my mother told me decades ago: No matter the obstacle ahead, _never tire of doing what's right_. That's how we'll build a better America together.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you again.

Val Demings

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
|
---
| | Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. **And today I need your help.** I know you're as grateful as I am for the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe. But I'm also concerned that the pro-life movement will mistakenly think this ruling means the fight is won. **Nothing could be further from the truth --[the fight for life is only just beginning!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39ce26acc2364022bbb3e81126c96185&_e=wY_GiUaIbF9RD6UGBoB1sjVH0_T8xx69FAfmXFlb0qkHmgDGAIfg8RaZniStqql7yQsUL8QUl-k0P_P0MjpchDu2BrLLoS10Ou4YlGRaP8O0YAgtsq61jmT7XBivkwHgn0OVuGw_AJmu14RAejP13fyF5_quBBQS3ZKlmrlZAfwhN_wYG7YkH0h9ZtAIoJZKQocr-_-yhEFvHlcZhobXuvRVhIDCfYOIHW_zlOrGSGJ_RnYnndQG200K2nMfe2NwN3DX5OpLQMtEBilZW0-G_yHTyhO6bJ4ae2GvvthCCf07upGVdvufXFYvekQkQLPTvgiU2tMOc_tLO5NQMgMm7WdQP32ksxuUjdLu0TwXWXL8qcI_0NsMLhpcj_lcSWnr)**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify abortion-on-demand at the expense of taxpayers like you.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

We must stand together to defend a culture of life across America. If we don't act now, I'm afraid that radicalized idealogues will continue to seize positions of power and abuse their authority to advance an anti-life agenda that is bent on the destruction of the American family.

**Today, I 'd like to invite you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:**

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39ce26acc2364022bbb3e81126c96185&_e=wY_GiUaIbF9RD6UGBoB1sjVH0_T8xx69FAfmXFlb0qkHmgDGAIfg8RaZniStqql7yQsUL8QUl-k0P_P0MjpchDu2BrLLoS10Ou4YlGRaP8O0YAgtsq61jmT7XBivkwHgn0OVuGw_AJmu14RAejP13fyF5_quBBQS3ZKlmrlZAfwhN_wYG7YkH0h9ZtAIoJZKQocr-_-yhEFvHlcZhobXuvRVhIDCfYOIHW_zlOrGSGLqjWvDqeTshrQ7MmwOMyEn57PQP59GJVCQL-7ywR9s4c7I6ekERhN1Mjk5ADiS1CKm1W0kLLJvn7hk9rUBj--IhaVLvt1-N9Iff6xfYM89x7HW3mfwwc_va7e4aUno5X1JuvuRwotb3pRdxT7DBfvk)

By signing the pledge, you will join a thriving movement of principled citizens who are uniting to protect the unborn and refusing to be silenced by a vocal minority of radicalized fanatics.

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take a minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39ce26acc2364022bbb3e81126c96185&_e=wY_GiUaIbF9RD6UGBoB1sjVH0_T8xx69FAfmXFlb0qkHmgDGAIfg8RaZniStqql7yQsUL8QUl-k0P_P0MjpchDu2BrLLoS10Ou4YlGRaP8O0YAgtsq61jmT7XBivkwHgn0OVuGw_AJmu14RAejP13fyF5_quBBQS3ZKlmrlZAfwhN_wYG7YkH0h9ZtAIoJZKQocr-_-yhEFvHlcZhobXuvRVhIDCfYOIHW_zlOrGSGLIwqvTrV3A_3F2XbVsoL3TVd1WwdRosnSwRtJ6BHX3Za8u6qshnuuLKqHpnrEv7vsa-n3JSOX6T2uykDf8Qhc2k_zw3wqGdbvgIiEIEIhzc95OzSBxH0ykt2dXm7GNpotvDt_ki-PbbK1ecTAQFMRt)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I need you with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**
My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.
Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**
**[Please, friend, will you chip in $5 or more right now to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign so we can keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54459266/378632549/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5075-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDZmY2IyNy1lNzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGt3G8JHCpcMrepRNBtmAdEtPB9q_Nz7FyLfDW_QH30=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54459267/378632550/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5075-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDZmY2IyNy1lNzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGt3G8JHCpcMrepRNBtmAdEtPB9q_Nz7FyLfDW_QH30=)
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.
**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like _you_ with me to win – now more than ever.**
**[So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more to become one of the 25,000 Founding Donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54459268/378632551/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5075-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDZmY2IyNy1lNzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGt3G8JHCpcMrepRNBtmAdEtPB9q_Nz7FyLfDW_QH30=)**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=5UObPPmisKfysVviZqVP0l3pRGOdpq%2FGMYUYf1Ed4SuUuSUbqwKOwGNMWl4GY%2FSOJEcWc5jAF1X928PxWaUeLk7lJYARq00mRIjaYX7VFHHqE1yxDR7sDv1v3fbjqTAann%2B7SvxcW0XzQ4XvJtfSc87N4HB4A5bAY53uw0u2gY1YKvVZ25Ttgt1YHJgjA5AIdf3OP2sKH3iN43cF2RgpsGOPmEhzuZlg6BwyHafN7q85z2Ppxe7gdlIIk0Ggypp7JgJnjcvTuZQVj2hSFlSTCYQxrkNmjfQV1cx8%2F%2FN0RSlQgbKkpM7LBaSiHdBt%2BCclKoGMuS2ofbcEPcf1HO4xgg7%2F3DfSth9kKXeo0qSXMafJdz5VzyCB1%2FFQ5NQauIgw32427H6WX%2FvmoGvl9suUCeC8U3uzYWWq%2FMKnLUWgIgQ%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54459269/378632552/-1565680314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDZmY2IyNy1lNzYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGt3G8JHCpcMrepRNBtmAdEtPB9q_Nz7FyLfDW_QH30=&emci=2cae88df-2761-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=f06fcb27-e761-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=1586379). | | © 2022 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Get your eyes on this NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If you want to save America, I need your help.
|
---
Fellow American,

Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line.

Our country's future is on the line.

**AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN.**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a472511d2cd438da18cbd48a47cbc99&_e=pK4lTB0HivrkexAHTQxrh5w2zaBuE5CXlnV_-E0hwnaYfX6pJP8_b19AvpN_rlalVhLCKDaOdwbn5MSxmF82Kkoce6nuvvPicTTQ20dTzmrGkhxa6hNWcd2TZMuh_gmWXip-QmpQapN_RTKeEgYdhlDviGGDPXRqlQELz61HXjm5Wbif03eI_nKA4Q-wr3DleXbooAkkO6ZFPRrqgYl1bREUSajAlOgBbCC6yH3iR83WKN0IGk8NLCV3hkWJVrFUODiVrn5ll1B4G8LhntqhEJ6IjeRwQPKNhk5lg3RN4GFTLQKd6pZZWoqeItzD6-4pT69dsaOkyQEjJZ2_B3cd9qsvawfW6nmauMhyfK4vC2qxrKlliAF4x9Q7ULXKJDhW1ZnHWM-PHRoXsOop7GfjM4Nm82vo7MJwQZrIILoZoKK-C6e9cMSsiPpDojU7OkagjbYK52dtdmha137ZOXn0UYOwlIvibxjNuy_a4iffJDEKq8FDsQGaJrMRUQqgt0Wf)
_Fellow American, you and I both know our country is on the wrong track._ **But if Senator Warnock is re-elected and Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we will get more of the same: more inflation, more crime, more open borders, more woke policies, and more support for the disastrous Biden agenda.**

**[If you want to WIN in Georgia, TAKE CONTROL of the Senate, and SAVE this great nation of ours, then I need your help RIGHT NOW. Please chip in $5, $50, or even $500 if you can in the next 15 minutes.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a472511d2cd438da18cbd48a47cbc99&_e=pK4lTB0HivrkexAHTQxrh5w2zaBuE5CXlnV_-E0hwnaYfX6pJP8_b19AvpN_rlalVhLCKDaOdwbn5MSxmF82Kkoce6nuvvPicTTQ20dTzmrGkhxa6hNWcd2TZMuh_gmWXip-QmpQapN_RTKeEgYdhlDviGGDPXRqlQELz61HXjm5Wbif03eI_nKA4Q-wr3DleXbooAkkO6ZFPRrqgYl1bREUSajAlOgBbCC6yH3iR83WKN0IGk8NLCV3hkWJVrFUODiVrn5ll1B4G8LhntqhEJ6IjeRwQPKNhk5lg3RN4GFTLQKd6pZZWoqeItzD6-4pT69dsaOkyQEjJZ2_B3cd9tYYDb8AN58yt6c7W0-wYl7hOcwUbS-HyORM0VNZlh9Llvi7oiaWs0MzjjqjJRytyYqFwv5ROVAO9GNjSjPEovjqs1J1e6xhko7tSXHFS9JVtOKuESMuw-oL9m-dgRlX4YU1JPUHIsQyxY4aEpZI_82EfzNr4erBWn3QuVrNTN2B)**

Fellow American, you and I both know our country is on the wrong track. But if Senator Warnock is re-elected and Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we will get more of the same: more inflation, more crime, more open borders, more woke policies, and more support for the disastrous Biden agenda. I'm fired up for this runoff election and ready to get America back on track, but I can't do it alone. I need your help. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54484789/378668650/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221111_FR_WIN_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWRjMzg3OS0xMjYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ivRBFno9VgqUUoaBwYI0XAStoUu8I3IMiicwYLOU0kA=) It’s just been made official, folks – I’ve won re-election to represent Nevada’s Third District! I’m immensely grateful for the support that’s been extended to me and my campaign over the past year. I’m also grateful for my family, campaign staff, and for you, for sticking with me through what was the toughest race of my life. **I could not have won this race without your support.** This was no walk in the park, either. Our race was considered one of the most competitive and expensive by forecasters and analysts across the country. The Republican Party even spent more than $14 million to do everything they could to beat us on Election Day. But that didn’t stop me from believing in this team and it sure didn’t stop you from supporting me, either. I owe you a tremendous debt of gratitude. Just because we won this race doesn’t mean the battle is over. Looking forward, I’m ready to continue the great work that I’ve done for Nevadans for nearly four years. Now more than ever, we need to protect reproductive rights, lower costs for working families, make health care more affordable and accessible, protect our sacred democracy, and protect Nevada’s water access. _If my to-do list seems long to you,**it’s because it is.**_ I’ll never lose my determination to serve Nevadans no matter the difficulty or number of obstacles in front of me. And now, we’ve shown for a third time that this grassroots team has what it takes to get the job done. So, let’s take today to rest from our hard work and resolve that tomorrow begins a new stage of the fight for making Nevada the best it possibly can be. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Susie Lee

body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54484894/378669012/-608928999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJiMWY2ZS0xNDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ssG3qc2mVPsgDv4R9QnqED4p7KWXoMMW2j6eQ5H24LA=&emci=31e0c219-5760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=4ebb1f6e-1462-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=16675641)
---
Friends, right now, it’s too early to call the outcome of our race for Congress in California’s 3rd district. We are going to wait this out and give the hardworking election officials time to count every single ballot. While I often talk about how my parents taught me the value of education and hard work, they also taught me patience! Something we may need in the coming days. In the meantime, I want to say again: _**thank you.**_ This campaign started because I could no longer sit on the sidelines at a time when we need leaders to put partisanship aside and step up and serve our community. In a combat zone you don’t spend your time worrying about your differences; you work together to get the job done and keep each other safe. That’s the energy we had during this campaign and that’s the energy I hope to bring to Washington. When we began this campaign over a year ago, the pundits said we didn’t have a chance. **But over 1,000 folks stepped up to volunteer, and over 17,500 of you donated.** Together, we created a real movement for change — as evidenced by how close this race is. I’m proud to have been on this journey with you. My team is closely monitoring the results, and we will keep you updated. In thanks, Dr. Kermit Jones | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54484895/378669013/-608928999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJiMWY2ZS0xNDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ssG3qc2mVPsgDv4R9QnqED4p7KWXoMMW2j6eQ5H24LA=&emci=31e0c219-5760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=4ebb1f6e-1462-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=16675641)

clean_body: | | Friends, right now, it’s too early to call the outcome of our race for Congress in California’s 3rd district. We are going to wait this out and give the hardworking election officials time to count every single ballot. While I often talk about how my parents taught me the value of education and hard work, they also taught me patience! Something we may need in the coming days. In the meantime, I want to say again: thank you. This campaign started because I could no longer sit on the sidelines at a time when we need leaders to put partisanship aside and step up and serve our community. In a combat zone you don’t spend your time worrying about your differences; you work together to get the job done and keep each other safe. That’s the energy we had during this campaign and that’s the energy I hope to bring to Washington. When we began this campaign over a year ago, the pundits said we didn’t have a chance. But over 1,000 folks stepped up to volunteer, and over 17,500 of you donated. Together, we created a real movement for change — as evidenced by how close this race is. I’m proud to have been on this journey with you. My team is closely monitoring the results, and we will keep you updated. In thanks, Dr. Kermit Jones | | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. subject: Top Story on Fox News: RAZOR THIN lead
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6d7a660d56&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter —My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so** _**razor**_****_**thin**_**it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[ This is where I need your help.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cdc2a3f3b9&e=fdefed58de)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=92ffdcbfbe&e=fdefed58de) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need**[**your help once again**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=bb2510c49e&e=fdefed58de)**. Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle.**
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9b157b37eb&e=fdefed58de)
Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Joey, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5635903112&e=fdefed58de).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need**[**your support**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4b694804a8&e=fdefed58de)**to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d41b01671d&e=fdefed58de)
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d4451f448c&e=fdefed58de)

clean_body: We’ve got to save Georgia to save America! | Peter, I know JD Vance just won his election, but the fight’s not over yet in Georgia. Right now, in Georgia, Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life to win his run-off and stop radical Socialist Raphael Warnock from winning and ripping the rights and freedoms away from the people of Georgia. We know Election Day just came and went and, you’ve done everything AND MORE to help keep Ohio red, but we’re asking for your help one more time to secure the Georgia Senate seat. | We don’t have any more time to waste. We’re begging that you step up so we can protect the Senate Majority by getting Herschel Walker over the finish line! Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. _**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Thank you from the bottom of my heart, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Asif Mahmood For Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54484922/378669314/1493062117?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjg3NjU5MC0xNDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8socl0b9CJQFh3w9aN4fT4uCrAnhGzQYUOm2Z2PjX0=)
Friend,

Earlier today, I called to congratulate Congresswoman Kim on her victory in this race for CA-40.

I know this campaign did not go as we had hoped, but **I want to take a moment and say thank you.** Many of you have been with me since day one, and because of your hard work, we put this district on the map as one of the most competitive races in the country.

It is easy to feel disheartened by these results. However, this defeat does not mark the end of our movement. I believe in the American people and our willingness to fight for what’s right. So, I encourage all of you to continue to organize and find hope in each other as I found in all of you in tough moments during this campaign.

I wish for Young Kim’s success because she will represent all of us in this district - Democrats, Republicans, and Independents.

Thank you for everything.

Sincerely,

Dr. Asif Mahmood

Friend,
Our work’s not done yet in Georgia.
Rev. Warnock is advancing to a runoff, and we can’t afford to lose our momentum.
We’re tired, and we know you are too – **but we have another opportunity to ensure that Senator Warnock stays in the Senate and that we keep Georgia blue!**
We have less than _**ONE MONTH**_ to do everything we can to turn out every Democrat in Georgia for Rev. Warnock and push him over the finish line.

We’re tired, and we know you are too – but we have another opportunity to ensure that Senator Warnock stays in the Senate and that we keep Georgia blue! We have less than ONE MONTH to do everything we can to turn out every Democrat in Georgia for Rev. Warnock and push him over the finish line. We have the votes, but with the margins so close, everything's going to come down to how many Democrats we can reach in the next couple of weeks. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between split between Democratic Party of Georgia and Jacky Rosen: | | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re so close to winning, but we need help from grassroots supporters like YOU to finish the job once and for all. – Georgia Democrats | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 United States

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848893:JhhXDpGNT:m:1:3331421248:9F211F8D7A1BD316D80654F7953C570F:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848894:JhhXDpGNT:m:1:3331421248:9F211F8D7A1BD316D80654F7953C570F:r)

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848893:JhhXDpGNT:m:1:3331421248:9F211F8D7A1BD316D80654F7953C570F:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848893:JhhXDpGNT:m:1:3331421248:9F211F8D7A1BD316D80654F7953C570F:r)**

Thank you,

name: PA House Dems
subject: We won the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
And now we need your help
#
Derek — We just took the majority in the State House for the first time in over a decade! There is so much to celebrate, but we can’t rest on our laurels just yet.
**The PA GOP is challenging close State House races across the commonwealth in an attempt to undermine our elections and keep control of our legislature. We can’t let this happen.**
**[Please split an emergency contribution between the PAHDCC Voter Protection Fund and John Fetterman right now to help us prepare to fight back >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221111-1?refcode=em20221111-8127&refcode2=8127_434096_ovRETf&akid=8127%2E434096%2EovRETf)**
**[Contribute Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221111-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221111-8127&refcode2=8127_434096_ovRETf&akid=8127%2E434096%2EovRETf)**
The people of Pennsylvania have spoken and they have elected a Democratic majority to control the State House next year. We can’t let the radical PAGOP take that away. **[Please split a contribution if you are able between our Voter Protection Fund and John Fetterman to help us defend the results of Tuesday’s election.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221111-1?refcode=em20221111-8127&refcode2=8127_434096_ovRETf&akid=8127%2E434096%2EovRETf)**

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: A heartfelt Veterans Day message...
body:
Earn this!

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
The best way to honor those who gave their one life for our freedom is to **_earn_** the freedom that they sacrificed their lives for, as Captain Miller said in Saving Private Ryan.

Earlier this morning, I went LIVE on Facebook to share a heartfelt Veterans Day message... I have uploaded the replay to YouTube and I invite you to listen closely as I get a little vulnerable and share my heart.

_"Patriotism is as much a virtue as justice, and is as necessary for the support of societies as natural affection is for the support of families. The armor patriae [love of country] is both a moral and a religious duty. It comprehends not only the love of our neighbors but of millions of our fellow creatures, not only of the present but of future generations."_

-Benjamin Rush

**Click below to watch the replay.**

Don't forget to share and subscribe.

Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e5a755a2c9ce4cefbf4fe0626c6dc6c5&_e=DmPDFnsEPo3I5eIgsSWX22An0BGXbvbct_Xw51TGbl50pfRoC3HFXNuoeMYTlu67vZnmq328B7pDBMyNJTAVYue0PXMU0jIvSoK6w7mwEdSj1xiBNYrm5LAKD4fI09dkSMeILMlHvLBiFNWXxM1ZRRxfIH1ch6OUcEtXsHWVYN43YvZAXgJsO8yvzop8nO2Cgw--YAWs2vzK7zV0-X7hVJEgb9oaUMvaBa7VuLaqB0_Y5eZD9m12O8tPdjIYoZX9q7RScfboYpNim_d6EMfuAZD0tpanTvVcDmAXtZsYya7QdnZOhIpR09aiSTr72Px_8gXusSFhXIrH9vMka38q4sNgTg20Ca8k9Y5D1gXYoJ-e39rYjdRnRbbxloIwtC9SALHGvAnpaWAMwpVX7mkYJMj7zInbU6IiVkZ3yCHLDXOzLj218WCGauyrLDNcnbXkxUe1cG6PO__-D9PHOh09xA%3D%3D)**

subject: Is this what you want?

body:

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848549:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848550:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848551:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848552:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848549:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848549:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848549:6pTqipGNT:m:1:3370555685:39E561835B5CE670B6BE2182F7CE05AA:r)

Herschel Walker

| | Friend, 🇺🇸 It is humbling to be the Congressman-elect for New Jersey’s Seventh District. 🇺🇸
Over the course of this campaign, I spoke directly to voters in each of the 95 towns in this district. It was clear that they were ready for new representation. Throughout this district and throughout this nation, we have been given an opportunity to change the course of history. My solemn pledge to you will always be to serve with integrity, to listen, to learn, to earn this responsibility you’ve honored me with to steer this nation towards greater opportunity, security, and prosperity. From the bottom of my heart, thank you to all of our supporters for their time, faith, passion, and trust. Without your support, this would not be possible. Be safe,Tom Tom Kean, Jr. Congressman-elect, NJ-07
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: One more chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848577:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848577:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848578:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848579:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848580:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848577:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848577:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61848577:J77VWpGiN:m:1:3371220873:4F75337991D4022C74C109B60D030CAB:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kari Lake is one of the most dangerous politicians in America. The Blue Amp community helped Katie Hobbs’s campaign fight back against Lake in the election, and now we have to protect all that work by making sure the votes are counted properly. This race is close. Your help right now can make sure it’s decided fairly.
body:
Don’t let them cheat on this one
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28fb38b1-96a8-4637-912c-8769d013999e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We must make sure every vote is counted in Arizona, so Democrat Katie Hobbs becomes Governor, and one of the worst democracy-haters--Kari Lake--never gets that job.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96fb160c-2027-465e-b279-140d5cdd8767/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_If Hobbs wins--and right now she is up by 27,000 votes, but there are 300,000-400,000 votes left to count--we'll elect a Democratic Governor in Arizona for the first time in over a dozen years, a HUGE pickup. As Secretary of State, Hobbs refused to bow to Donald Trump's pressure campaign in 2020. We can feel good about a fair election in 2024 with Hobbs in the Governor's mansion._** **_Meanwhile, we must understand Lake respects neither our laws nor our Constitution. With her lies about voting, she's put Maricopa County election workers in danger--they've received regular death threats Lake threatened to shut down the media in Arizona if she wins and hasn't promised to accept the election results. She's told us she'll do the same in 2024 as Governor, meaning she'll cheat for Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis or whomever the GOP nominates for President._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Count Every Arizona Vote**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50c00a3a-3655-4ece-8129-32ecc07f5d24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Kari Lake, in my estimation, is one of the most dangerous politicians in America, because of her willingness to do anything to win and television skills she developed, ironically, as a tv news anchor over two decades. _** [**The vote counting is going on as we send this. THE TIME IS NOW. Would you join Blue Amp Action in rushing the necessary resources--be it $5, $10, $25 or more--to Katie Hobbs to ensure she has the necessary lawyers and staff so they count every vote and Kari Lake can't cheat her way to victory?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8fa862c-1542-483d-a996-12e515139bd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks, as always, my friends.** Cliff
---
| | |

|

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: Democracy doesn’t happen by accident. We have to defend, strengthen, and renew it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. After a long campaign season I still believe what I always have. | |
---
We had a strong night on Tuesday.**I want to thank this entire grassroots team for your hard work, determination, and sacrifice that helped elect Democrats.** Listen, Derek, voters spoke clearly about their concerns in this election. They sent a clear and unmistakable message that they want to preserve our democracy and protect the right to choose in this country. And we can’t forget about the young people of this nation who voted in historic numbers again, just as they did two years ago. They voted to continue addressing the climate crisis, gun violence, their personal rights and freedoms, and student debt relief. **It is not lost on me that we would not be here without you, Derek.** The generous donations of this grassroots team have put us in an incredibly strong position. _And we’re just getting started._ **I will always put the needs and interests of the American people first.** I'm going to continue to focus on cost cutting for working and middle class families, and building an economy from the bottom up and middle out. **I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. That is in no small part because of this team.** After a long campaign season, I still believe what I always have: This is a great nation and we’re a great people. There is nothing we can’t do if we do it together. We just need to remember who we are. We are the _United_ States of America. Thank you for everything and God bless you, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
President of the United States
[ ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x_Axe9OmaJo0FwLB4twDFs1khOy1ef30zSiKcf1G0E3l-lYFcZ9llNnox4cg7e7cdZac3xw_BiJFzQJ-A7oK-jXQBbhkuZa2Zwc7aITDZrt-t8kaglbKovMQeOUdbffvNrSvI2rFZB300rZWEABC2cLchISBIG1eLX5miKIrepq4VBV1OyxOxrryrb4kk3LHi7EcftYhO6GUgxRU--L9d2BCy1G4aDs-xgBP-6RZs1ySvC-58VUAObqiv3vah-TQ-qmgJaeEUjIUs8nsEEDZtLL36ZQ2ST7yBtfRTmed6kI0B300v4foA4EU6g-YquoEFwlfkMy2Zv1NnfzlvjAdzsPTPcYr24ML8n2Ij7q5Is0tb6H-B0-xQPI-pzZX6ajgJE45E65w7PcZepPwHaiLEehiW633rV1ERjUXtWRLbk4madoY8lQOZNNHDKphba_71b_AJiiNwGUM7g2BdbQxW-UQeAsur53oBaDp_BRCc4gEU9teMnw3dyf40whBaR9rV06IB7k7Kg3mnTjSiVhVe5pIBdsLKZultVRbrHV6omrFANOzguVEIM2rqj1N4tROgMJUAa8e0vEQgyRFNujyPqZF2G780OdMoTXGcPMnuqGv_vNytMUgiYVqqRSckOpBY/3r2/rzbAH5EER-elvofwISNcvQ/h0/n9ZHzSeHZ-JL5fiFb61r2nGM4HW5XTgW2yYnKytsF_o)

clean_body: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. After a long campaign season I still believe what I always have. | | We had a strong night on Tuesday.I want to thank this entire grassroots team for your hard work, determination, and sacrifice that helped elect Democrats. Listen, Derek, voters spoke clearly about their concerns in this election. They sent a clear and unmistakable message that they want to preserve our democracy and protect the right to choose in this country. And we can’t forget about the young people of this nation who voted in historic numbers again, just as they did two years ago. They voted to continue addressing the climate crisis, gun violence, their personal rights and freedoms, and student debt relief. It is not lost on me that we would not be here without you, Derek. The generous donations of this grassroots team have put us in an incredibly strong position. And we’re just getting started. I will always put the needs and interests of the American people first. I'm going to continue to focus on cost cutting for working and middle class families, and building an economy from the bottom up and middle out. I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. That is in no small part because of this team. After a long campaign season, I still believe what I always have: This is a great nation and we’re a great people. There is nothing we can’t do if we do it together. We just need to remember who we are. We are the United States of America. Thank you for everything and God bless you, Joe Joseph R. Fellow American,

Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line.

Our country's future is on the line.

**AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbb2f0b931b44284920de30d36934e0f&_e=cGaq2vED5njuC-mNTgu89aBOrAdEJ1cbF-9g3qUTAMEaNX5ZNIGQsUSAAGTRdzgcUhsNgOI_LeB264KTFpqvl6ksy-RhdqjUP2Sawdy589HlFYk8JRR5ZheuBfTzJCZTGotBjxtzlzhLwCer5YOhw5-tqvw7cdCOUYwKkMdi87bi_DKr0NgQ07c_XHhTY_eUQSjZCwLgmwRRVYxs-J9nUDHkfR4aJUVE4HgMSH727Gfoo2dR6fwYYHoG6aZcZqB_zyjSEreeualOPQdDPMO6T0D-B1c6x8UDx4PbhNBakkkIvj3DE8BVTyCiPUL8BLfr_x20wzXJevEBWIzN1zSwW-HO0KLAGvSc4o3Ao2kHim6O7fHsClxG1NNy119tldsj_B1APTJYqnm80-Itdt9ViS-zNRP3te4hWouxMLDQ2ZPCUlFdefsI0zv2XEIeEnC64vtYjlu6z4Ev4lbkCijSZ_oXe0bu-CGGAkAVpVG_Awc%3D)

**[If you want to WIN in Georgia, TAKE CONTROL of the Senate, and SAVE this great nation of ours, then I need your help RIGHT NOW. clean_body: If you want to save America, I need your help. | Fellow American, Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line. Our country's future is on the line. AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN. Fellow American, you and I both know our country is on the wrong track. But if Senator Warnock is re-elected and Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we will get more of the same: more inflation, more crime, more open borders, more woke policies, and more support for the disastrous Biden agenda. I'm fired up for this runoff election and ready to get America back on track, but I can't do it alone. I need your help. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. subject: I want to thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54481415/378651274/-1425992037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQxZjU0Zi1mOTYxLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUxZWUxZGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BmbnnB3zXW3vNNfjIreqTpAnUFQmH9YF610q9OCIZA=&emci=a7d49ea6-ed61-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=5ed1f54f-f961-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&ceid=18634996) Team –

I want to thank the hardworking Arizonans that made calls, knocked doors, and engaged voters – especially the unparalleled staff on Team O’Halleran. I cannot begin to express my gratitude to this uniquely giving, intelligent, and truly dedicated group of people.

Whether they voted by mail or in person, Arizonans turned out and participated in our democracy this year. And an essential part of that democracy is a peaceful transfer of power at every level of government.

There’s no denying that my team and I are incredibly disappointed in these results, but I thank the families of Arizona's First District for giving me the opportunity to serve you these last six years.

I thank my opponent for a well-fought and challenging race and wish him all the best in his service to Arizona’s Second District.

Thank you,

Tom

Friend: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. **Here's why:**
* FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

* BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

* **NOW, we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to become Runoff Founding Donors before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.**

name: Jenny Delwood, Team Bass
subject: [UPDATE]: The race is tightening
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
We may not have the results for a while.

Hey team, I wanted to send a quick update about the vote count.

With approximately 62% of expected votes reported, Karen has taken the lead!! She now has 50.4% of the vote, compared to 49.6% for our opponent.

Our team continues to feel great about the numbers, and Karen is optimistic and ready to roll up her sleeves and get to work.

As we await the next update, we’re already preparing to implement our solutions for homelessness, public safety, and affordability. Our city is facing crises that deserve immediate action.

Angelenos need a mayor who is prepared to chart a new direction for Los Angeles, and Karen Bass is ready to do that on her first day in office. Karen has the plan, the experience, and the vision to move us forward.

Thank you for all of your support. We'll be in touch soon!

Jenny Delwood
_Campaign Manager_

PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 - General
777 S Figueroa St
STE 4050
Los Angeles, CA 90017

clean_body: We may not have the results for a while. Hey team, I wanted to send a quick update about the vote count. With approximately 62% of expected votes reported, Karen has taken the lead!! She now has 50.4% of the vote, compared to 49.6% for our opponent. Our team continues to feel great about the numbers, and Karen is optimistic and ready to roll up her sleeves and get to work. As we await the next update, we’re already preparing to implement our solutions for homelessness, public safety, and affordability. Our city is facing crises that deserve immediate action. Angelenos need a mayor who is prepared to chart a new direction for Los Angeles, and Karen Bass is ready to do that on her first day in office. Karen has the plan, the experience, and the vision to move us forward. Thank you for all of your support. We'll be in touch soon! subject: Taliban Uses U.S. Military Equipment, IG Withholds Records of Afghan Security Forces Collapse
body:
The Taliban is training and operating with U.S. military equipment
including rifles, trucks, and helmets with night vision mounts since
the Biden administration withdrew American troops from Afghanistan
last year.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 10, 2022

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61008&L=28421&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFsaWJhbi11c2VzLXVzLW1pbGl0YXJ5LWVxdWlwbWVudC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]

The Taliban is training and operating with U.S. military equipment
including rifles, trucks, and helmets with night vision mounts since
the Biden administration withdrew American troops from Afghanistan
last year. Taliban forces even held a military parade with dozens of
U.S.-provided armored vehicles and Mi-17 helicopters flying overhead,
according to a federal audit documenting the collapse of the
American-funded Afghan National Defense and Security Forces (ANDSF).
For two decades the U.S. government spent a mind-boggling $90 billion
to help the ANDSF develop into a self-sustaining force capable of
combatting terrorist groups like the Taliban. It never happened.

name: Britney Whaley, Working Families Party
subject: Making a plan for Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
It could all come down to Georgia. Again. | | | Peter —
**It could all come down to Georgia again.** Just like in 2021, control of the U.S. Senate could hinge on whether we can turn out our voters in a runoff election here in the Peach State. Last time around, Working Families Party organizers and volunteers ramped up after Election Day 2020 to help reach almost _two million_ voters in Georgia through texting, phone banks, canvassing, and relational organizing in the runoffs. This time, we have to move even faster. **Republicans have moved the runoff date up by an entire month to December 6th, all in an attempt to make it harder for us to mobilize the voters we need to win.** **[We’re on the ground in Georgia right now and ready to turn out voters to defeat Herschel Walker, re-elect Raphael Warnock, and secure the Democratic majority in the Senate — but just like last time, we are counting on your support to do it. clean_body: It could all come down to Georgia. Again. | | | Peter — It could all come down to Georgia again. Just like in 2021, control of the U.S. Senate could hinge on whether we can turn out our voters in a runoff election here in the Peach State. Last time around, Working Families Party organizers and volunteers ramped up after Election Day 2020 to help reach almost two million voters in Georgia through texting, phone banks, canvassing, and relational organizing in the runoffs. This time, we have to move even faster. Republicans have moved the runoff date up by an entire month to December 6th, all in an attempt to make it harder for us to mobilize the voters we need to win. We’ve already built up significant infrastructure in Georgia for the November election this year — including a dedicated group of 250 volunteers, a network of text and phone bankers, and the local knowledge needed to make a major impact. Now we’re ready to push hard through the finish line on December 6th. Once again, the Georgia runoff has the potential to be absolutely pivotal for control of the U.S. Senate. With your support, we’re not going to let the GOP send Herschel Walker anywhere close to the Senate. In solidarity, Britney Whaley Southeast Regional Director Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. | "URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>" | "URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>" | Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District RED is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN. Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and . We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need to do so. We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome. I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. name: Joe Kent
subject: 6500 Ballots Rejected, 5500 Vote Margin.....
body:
Dear Peter,
Since I last wrote you, counting has continued and our 11,000 vote deficit is now a 5500 vote deficit.
We've also discovered 6500 ballots that have been rejected so far that could potentially make up this deficit if we can get to these voters and remind them to "cure" their ballots.
We are currently pursuing these voters with door knockers, live phone calls, and text messages.
Unfortunately, we spent all of the money we raised during the election on the election, and we're scrambling to raise the money to fund this post-election effort to make sure or supporters' votes count.
Can you please help us close the gap by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/t34tmfPImwaP0763Rup67631GA/XcPy8927qbRydyM1C80763gy763Q)?
**We said it before and it 's even more true now: this election may determine whether Republicans take back the Congress or if Nancy Pelosi remains speaker. **
Please give what you can today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9HTs4m0fF9LcC8dm7ibGpA/XcPy8927qbRydyM1C80763gy763Q) right away.
Thank you and God Bless,

Joe Kent

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Hate doesn’t win
body:
This was never something one person could do alone – and you and this grassroots team showed up in a big way to make it happen. | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIq45qgM0LGkgd86qa5aoDp-j1ZFUFhGdBoX3mIVs-ONqPvIDZXjNEKV6XW2CZL_-HlsQU50Xbx7SjRIrkIKfrPLN7-Otxm6-IFn1EVe1RvV1IN5LqavLLC8su6QSLzhLPM9tfs9PcPmZXXBGxE0Po4TUQsaOfmnDAm0FCiuRPtGpC_m7BNDp-6XWRn-ObvfAdbKuAF54XrGSaWqTc2JxbZSTPew4G7SBrJRCkxV9C73CUbxcN7uX3hMdWSr6yocC7QTKVJAukCaJVDIin5G09bvLmu_W_xuuWW0zPzumTM8taP6NrMH_rTDy_TDZUKIqZEztkLWnXTuWmNYygLAGNWSNwz79CfgSJ0pq29B_t2FnNFJ-YrIBRPnJz6SGqZ6o/3r2/114xITpVS4Ss9kYjSyKeJg/h0/QwDhsmoGoxNeCATuA9kRVLBs4DeWgDrW8FK-rzt21BM) In April, I took to the Michigan Senate floor to take a stand for those who don't have a voice, defending the children being used by my Republican colleagues to stoke hate. On that day, I recommitted myself to winning back the Michigan Senate for the first time in nearly forty years. **But it was never something one person could do alone – and you and this grassroots team showed up in a big way to make it happen.** Together, we raised millions of dollars to invest in winning a historically underfunded ballot level. We put organizers on the ground, met voters where they were, and helped as many as we could get to the polls. _And we won._ Now, in addition to flipping BOTH chambers of the Michigan legislature and the Minnesota Senate – standing up new Democratic trifectas in both states – state Democrats are winning big across the country, too. **In fact, Democrats are on track to hold onto every single one of their majorities – the first time the party in power hasn't lost a single state legislative chamber during a midterm election year since at least 1934.** **But our work in this election isn't over yet: State Democrats across the country are still facing recounts, run-offs, and special elections across the country in states like Pennslyvania, New Hampshire, and Minnesota in the next few weeks, so this fight isn’t over.** [State legislatures are the final frontier of saving abortion access and the future of our elections, and we need all the help we can get in these critical chambers. Can you chip in $7 to help power state Democrats to the finish line?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wIq45qgM0LGkgd86qa5aoDp-j1ZFUFhGdBoX3mIVs-ONqPvIDZXjNEKV6XW2CZL_-HlsQU50Xbx7SjRIrkIKfrPLN7-Otxm6-IFn1EVe1RvV1IN5LqavLLC8su6QSLzhLPM9tfs9PcPmZXXBGxE0Po4TUQsaOfmnDAm0FCiuRPtJSyT55ZVWBqZUpsdvpM_OusW2BkF6Y31odvPo6O8g-24Z5LEvt1dPiOwFvrXRktkQO_aSv8EoqeSFQO-FmDrSUOi72kN_2WRSPLoNa9givPz4FRpkVcpaiy6wFzesj0sF4GlFHMqRVe0kTzQwEQXn8cTjxXkefd5dgbZS61nxWpzZ51QFTmmE8TzmbrRF0P6vKQ-FCf2OYIsdvh5LU3Rr0/3r2/114xITpVS4Ss9kYjSyKeJg/h1/7zKmQpALESE8eWaHJzmQXZuXDGuB0MLB9HvLvScOXWY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: This was never something one person could do alone – and you and this grassroots team showed up in a big way to make it happen. | | | | | In April, I took to the Michigan Senate floor to take a stand for those who don't have a voice, defending the children being used by my Republican colleagues to stoke hate. On that day, I recommitted myself to winning back the Michigan Senate for the first time in nearly forty years. But it was never something one person could do alone – and you and this grassroots team showed up in a big way to make it happen. Together, we raised millions of dollars to invest in winning a historically underfunded ballot level. We put organizers on the ground, met voters where they were, and helped as many as we could get to the polls. And we won. Now, in addition to flipping BOTH chambers of the Michigan legislature and the Minnesota Senate – standing up new Democratic trifectas in both states – state Democrats are winning big across the country, too. In fact, Democrats are on track to hold onto every single one of their majorities – the first time the party in power hasn't lost a single state legislative chamber during a midterm election year since at least 1934. But our work in this election isn't over yet: State Democrats across the country are still facing recounts, run-offs, and special elections across the country in states like Pennslyvania, New Hampshire, and Minnesota in the next few weeks, so this fight isn’t over. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Please. I know you’ve been fighting alongside me and the DLCC for months – but we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas now. Please, consider chipping in today. Thank you times a million, Mallory McMorrow Michigan State Senator, District 13 | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. Hi Derek, it's Don Davis. Today is Veterans Day. From my time in the US Air Force, I understand the sacrifices our military families make and why we must honor all veterans for their patriotism, love of country, and willingness to serve. I'm proud to have served our country alongside so many incredible veterans with respect and gratitude — honoring all who served and their families. Thank you, and Happy Veterans Day! 🇺🇸 Congressman-elect Don Davis | | In Congress, Don will fight for every eastern North Carolinian. body:

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $34, $50, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61849053:6svJcpGyN:m:1:3365131770:1B4C7270127FFEFAF38831AA4CD97A29:r)**

subject: All power to all people.

body:
We came up short but our movement will continue to grow. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-YMK2nZ1oLSGK7Eu8zzFauYyE4Hmjlj22pm0DmzCmtD-6hnIR-r0BfTgNQTRH_ASI4rG4PZeqe9Hyh7LBSfB39cjZ56AMuOefc_-aK10-TOlOW-o8Uwo2xm8Oi8BDjiv15T0aeVwYol3ifCQfVdk7CVW-LCyuJNlrDmNuUvLZ3dzOWHYSJMAEoIiZtiKzo196HlVbsEufhnMmu2oWVTsjKU/3r2/emkYiFNoTHWCo2ZKuGwChw/h0/fVRrm3bAh-LgRLLPLeDx0LfXNm6Fu7z-UZ-Hqbrvsng) Peter, We've had some tremendous wins but unfortunately, we came up short in this election. But I wouldn't have done this thing any other way. My life called me into organizing, and I bring that calling with me to my work every day. I'm not afraid to call it like I see it, to show up, to get loud, to speak truth to power, and to lay it all on the line for my people. I might be a different kind of politician and that's because politics doesn't have enough people like you and me. I am one of you. I know what it's like to work two jobs, to live paycheck to paycheck, to see my friends and family locked up because of the criminal INjustice system. **This country is full of people just like me.** People who know what it's like to be a statistic, an underdog, a cog in the wheel of capitalism. Nineteen months ago, you trusted me enough to join me on this journey. And even though the outcome of this race wasn't what we had hoped for, I stand here proud as hell for the work we've done. We created something beautiful in this campaign. We knocked doors that had never been knocked. We activated people who had never been reached. We watched as single moms and college students voted for the first time ever. And now? We're going to take this movement and water it and nurture it and watch it grow into something bigger than we could ever imagine. So today, we rest. Tomorrow, we pick up where we left off. All power to all people. Thank you, Odessa Kelly

| | **Honoring All Who Served 🇺🇸**
---
| |
---
Today is Veterans Day. And if I were a betting man, I would say you have a family member or friend who bravely served in our armed forces. Maybe even _you_ served in our military. If that’s the case, I want to say thank you. Today is a day to remember and honor our courageous men and women—from this generation and those that came before—for risking their lives so that those at home can live in freedom and safety. Our veterans’ selflessness and heroism can never be forgotten. Sadly, some dirtbags don’t see it the same way. They see our veterans as a group to be preyed upon and an easy way to make a quick buck. Scammers from the depths of their mothers' basements are [targeting](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6e95f7bb7b3a4a5e8eecfe1441164d6c&_e=LpAB-JKgIPpq0ni9LT4rOfq4bBu_xYgxlrHZJk6C7WvTfex3v2DkSVAPYhLs0auzN6NqF3WPfkKecRtSmglQ4nMIW-d-YIMW4GKOIxTuDVnlC2KSC6fLe56VFd_cG8Jx8-8FjlzHHY4NuLctqEI78lUCJTz0dsAmHL48-aX3Eix4fQdQZ7L5XuW05HaD3nMxRPiC6u4tK-zu-5t1BntekRSd3_PW_AHk_Z9nJQQNIR0%3D) those who served and fleecing them out of their hard-earned dollars. In 2021 alone, fraud cost veterans, service members, and their families [$267 million](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6e95f7bb7b3a4a5e8eecfe1441164d6c&_e=LpAB-JKgIPpq0ni9LT4rOaahEiEuFmwQEZnl8HPuYPFYOEgtyOEKhvl7KtgfxgU3UanqYimhY8l4zj1_4Zb4Vns-tR7RRSZatqwUyZQr1YRocEAS_j6tz341sPWU5LEL_zxiUtJZHPrvR2qLxx71IALCbABC_JgU3aRZNS63NV8B7mFmY_t51y_UWhvY8WI9a8e_WCyoWxTTAIht37aVu4n0UJwFKpKRl83NE3Y4GfK2l3SKj-_S9BQ2J_Qlg2Wb9f_vKIpENg-tnVcjXmV6rE-gzPIYMpCHBPcR4PrJpSevHcMX5VGQaCC-d1UVXs2uEUicOm3CgIMqNRZ5bB1fbzgCRlQTLqM8KZCfnyVWkd89jY-3P7Ba6PjfvpJZlTkb), a 162 percent increase from 2020. That’s why I’ve [sponsored](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6e95f7bb7b3a4a5e8eecfe1441164d6c&_e=LpAB-JKgIPpq0ni9LT4rOaa5DMwptM7b_qfGdgbfwyR9_q80thrieF5_VMO0wd_blcj8foLSsBX5JuoRna7y52E5sbHkpbAaQI8kJgyK6pI5t4BYZyjZD5mq9nnDiUdKbm6LrpRvfUlSADQ8dzTEhQAfjZVi575wZ7sX_f1yWghlFLV92G-o267I_a77MuBBH_qXBAJ2watJLiGrTkH2uvX7XGhzed3tTd2pVGtWeAM%3D) legislation to add up to 10 years to the sentence of a criminal convicted for targeting military veterans through the mail or by phone. Mess with the bull, you get the horns. To end on a positive note—I hope you can spend this meaningful day enjoying the blessings of freedom with your loved ones. And be sure to let a veteran know you’re grateful for his or her sacrifice.

Image courtesy of Knox News Speaking of paying tribute to our nation’s heroes, yesterday I had the opportunity of attending the unveiling of a [monument](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6e95f7bb7b3a4a5e8eecfe1441164d6c&_e=LpAB-JKgIPpq0ni9LT4rOa61bxYzhuvUTrg56l3AOKW0lmh1lXe_31m7TgS29FIyxTwW4wpg8JtdxqGrDPyEdcVVwGq1A8oPvooT3gFBSHC1Ht9MzI5FU72x3SfOjwtzR5L8sye-jR2mY46rGMsLPciU9XrC04gpZrivQIa_jNiZctOR264OS6pOjcx0Wr7NE7MiazhkLBXh3BpcTgl8D2xV1WcGIgqLfcUKfLtL4QI4ZzeQgL2kg8H6--P_6lGxozrdp5bUgmoTzXE9XQNxoLqHH5y4n62n7x4UETHGMjc%3D) at Powell High School that honors 13 former students killed in action from WWII and the Korean War through the Vietnam War. It was an honor to [present](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6e95f7bb7b3a4a5e8eecfe1441164d6c&_e=LpAB-JKgIPpq0ni9LT4rOYlWPXH_HH0omVPuhs1n6i6SEYeGrq223NJvUQTy0pVGmjzCIWwLh-FxJlO6ZSptFDvJMFX7PBloDpEvowU-Fa6iDBmSrbbHsyu8uWep8RAn_mvOiwyYRMJw496gAIeT8-k2Z1VEWHDW3NL3Rzg1UkQE6AptaBoA213tyr1GdJXDM7g8PkTgu-QMBL4iak_wlG4501x80g02ypbMC2N_q0qi2hOWDjog4YyolwCdJDkqyQ8LSQzrbMJQM60ujPmRkEuUBkwtvuVfAsbrI5ETnCztEJsiAJ9ARDcygGeXwbsullcYoSxbNf1Q47Me0CPU8DZwwRapHiCRJCFd6XBLXik%3D) principal Dr. Chad Smith with a U.S. flag that flew over the Capitol and speak with these families who sacrificed so much so that we could have our liberties here at home. God bless America, and God bless our troops.

body:

**_IF_** Democrats win Georgia's runoff election, we'll mantain our Democratic majority in the Senate.

**_IF_** we keep the Senate, Mitch McConnell will not be able to obstruct our progress.

**_IF_** we keep the Senate, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will be able to strengthen our voting rights, invest in clean energy, protect _Roe v. Wad_ e, and lead us to an economic recovery.

**BUT IF WE LOSE:** **Absolutely none of this will be possible to achieve... Mitch McConnell will make sure of that.**

clean_body: We know you're getting a ton of emails about Georgia. | Peter -- We know you're getting a ton of emails about the Georgia runoff. We'll be upfront: This is another one of those emails. But please let us explain EXACTLY why it's so urgent and important right now: IF Democrats win Georgia's runoff election, we'll mantain our Democratic majority in the Senate. IF we keep the Senate, Mitch McConnell will not be able to obstruct our progress. IF we keep the Senate, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will be able to strengthen our voting rights, invest in clean energy, protect Roe v. Wad e, and lead us to an economic recovery. BUT IF WE LOSE: Absolutely none of this will be possible to achieve... | [ BALANCE OF POWER: Where Uncalled Senate Races Stand ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49374%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QMl0vbgMm7gJRanihpOC%2bw&sysid=1)
---
[ There are still two Senate races up for grabs that will decide the fate of the U.S. Senate. Nevada and Georgia will determine who has the majority in the upper chamber and each race is coming down to the wire. As of Friday morning, Republican Adam Laxalt’s lead over Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto has shrunk to less than one point, at 48.9% to 48%. The latest updates from Clark and Washoe counties have put Laxalt just 8,988 votes over Cortez Masto with 90% of the total vote counted. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8zNIvJetS7wO3bbRDpgCaA&sysid=1)

Team, this is URGENT: Donald Trump just announced he will be unveiling a BIG decision _this Tuesday_ \-- **this could be his OFFICIAL 2024 announcement!**

Trump’s presidency was defined by his racism, incompetence, lies, and TWO separate impeachment trials. But even though most Americans are through with him, **Trump could be just DAYS away from launching a 2024 comeback.**

We need to prove where Americans stand BEFORE Trump makes his big announcement. Our urgent Live Poll closes tonight -- _but we’re still missing 37 responses from Pennsylvania!_ **Please, lock in your answer now:**

**Should Trump run for president in 2024?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8790?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221111-TrumpAlert-TrumpAnnounces1QS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221111-TrumpAlert-TrumpAnnounces1QS-Pros-sl1&akid=8640%2E9716520%2Ey5aw_a)

Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 26 days?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e7439f7ae6bc4d8ba31ad4dbb9b8cdf0&_e=PoF7p3buA0FcdIOoqbnUKvvGAE-cFG6AiFj37BM0oHGkrWbBnHPbAXbHGVIj9y79TBzA_UuzvOBy6HvgJnUu0EThXADx4jpMmp8swsIOwzjUg0hwNs8iaP34nnXxncj08yVBGaDSE4dBnoLD_fgRGwV2AFk5Fw1VdjODqDye8OC5XYtl5m1O1Rfpn_g7v0gr40eAp2pKBlSX06EoHS7etO2nAEqLNMsdxZhB_vrOtBQNBBfVTzD1gd2PsLBpotlacybVnnzu3ErScyyfJmGlRtyxH4su0jbnhQQOWYIi5S-cW7wm12zuW_mD8PFhgxWihVIoLXOQxpyMlyySCBKZNAN_FYECfAj_ujMbUagP_J_nZteYYYfquKDlXT2-_P3w334dA3qoanlbAiAPnZzM5bp-LAQ-MLIMipCy_1ZJEZfmwLT4H2VLlsiIUWUFLLe-)**

clean_body: It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. - With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Help early. Help often. Because even though we had a great night, Tuesday, we're not done yet. WE MUST WIN THIS ONE LAST RACE, and then we can rest for a bit before gearing up for the next fight.
body:
Protect Joe Biden’s agenda
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27da9051-c193-42e2-83b6-2f99155b4a21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Peter, [**Let's ensure we hold the Senate, and potentially even gain a seat, by re-electing Raphael Warnock in his runoff election on December 6th.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d900b61-a324-4e54-af17-deaeaab6c59d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Tuesday we beat election deniers and demagogic democracy-haters across the country. But in Herschel Walker--who threatened to murder multiple women and denies the results of the 2020 election--there's one more anti-democracy, Trumpian MAGA-nut left to send into electoral oblivion. **_A Democratic majority may come down to Georgia. If it doesn't, imagine gaining a seat in the Senate and getting that much closer to ending the filibuster, passing voting rights, codifying Roe, further fighting climate change, banning assault rifles, making the $15 minimum wage national, enacting paid family leave and so much more..._** **Yes, we had a great night, Tuesday. But we're not done yet. WE MUST WIN THIS ONE LAST RACE, and then we can rest for a bit before gearing up for the next fight.** As we saw this week, the GOP is sending Ted Cruz in to campaign for Walker to rally their base. They’re going to throw millions of dollars at this race and the Warnock campaign started on Wednesday at square one again; they spent everything they raised to get voters to the polls. Now they have to do it all again. _**If we want Joe Biden’s agenda to survive Sen. Joe Manchin’s stonewalling for the next two years ...**_ _**If we want Joe Biden’s judicial nominees to make it through the Senate ...**_ _**If we want to prevent national abortion bans ...**_ ... it’s important to help as much as we can and as soon as possible. [**Can you please join us in supporting Senator Warnock by rushing him a contribution of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T631c6d94-ceb5-44ac-bf52-1cb47bfd6396/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks so much. Blue Amp Action Community!** All my best, Cliff Schecter
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Sen. Warnock & Save The Senate Majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15eaed00-fecf-46f6-b2e1-9dcbb681720d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
