| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The people are winning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter —

On Tuesday, Justice Democrat Summer Lee was elected to represent PA-12,
making history as the first working class Black woman to represent
Pennsylvania in Congress. Thanks in large part to your unwavering support,
Summer will join AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush in the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120771?refcode=em20221111-26028&t=1001&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8 ]Thanks to you, Summer was able to run a 100% people-powered campaign
and WIN – only proving what we can do together when we go all in. Can you
chip in to help us support Summer & recruit more Justice Democrats like
her?

But Summer’s victory wasn’t without severe opposition. Leading up to
Election Day, AIPAC and other Super PACs spent millions of dollars
attacking Summer and elevating her insurrection-aligned Republican
opponent. Don’t forget: AIPAC also endorsed over 100 other
election-denying, insurrectionist-linked Republicans.

In the face of all these attacks, Summer ran a campaign that prioritized
bold change and transparency, refusing to take a cent from corporate Super
PACs, instead choosing to remain accountable to the people.

Summer just proved that we can defeat the divide-and-conquer politics of
right-wing Super PACs with a progressive and inclusive vision for a
multi-generational, multiracial movement. From unions and climate
activists to progressive leaders and working class families, we came
together to deliver a future that works for everyone in PA-12.

They had the money, Summer had the people. The people won.

Our movement is built by and for the people, and we’re just getting
started. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120771?refcode=em20221111-26028&t=1002&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8 ]Can you chip in $3 today to help Justice
Democrats continue to identify, recruit, and train candidates who are
ready to bring real, bold, change to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120771?refcode=em20221111-26028&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8 ]Contribute

We aren’t going anywhere.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221111-26028-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26028_1203867_YFMRa8&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26028%2E1203867%2EYFMRa8

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Politico goes behind the scenes on how we won

body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221111&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221111&amount=28]
Team,
The final days of any campaign are chaotic, and ours was no different.
In our case, this period of time was by captured in a Politico story about our race. They were given a front row seat for the final days on the trail, our data-driven approach, and why “losing better” is one of our mantras. Take a look:
https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2022/11/11/elissa-slotkin-michigan-election-00066278 [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2022/11/11/elissa-slotkin-michigan-election-00066278]
We hope you take a moment to read. And THANK YOU once again for all of your support during this crazy year!

Peter — in case you looked away for a moment you may have missed the fact that 2022 is actually NOT over.Georgia’s Senate race went to a run-off which will be happening on December 6, 2022. That race will determine which party holds the Senate and who is in the minority.**If Republicans fail to take the Senate, Joe Biden will be able continue to operate essentially unchecked even with a GOP House.** The Senate controls confirmations of nominees and Supreme Court justices. Fellow conservatives know that we DESPERATELY need that Supreme Court to stay in our corner... so we DESPERATELY need Herschel Walker to win this runoff.****
| [HELP HERSCHEL WIN - DONATE $50.00 RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=57102b4aff&e=fdefed58de)
---
Raphael Warnock, the radical Democrat running against Herschel, still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, Hersche’s campaign spent almost EVERYTHING during the first round of voting.** That means that he’s going to need groups like the Fredrick Douglass PAC to pick up the slack and spend huge amounts of money to get him over the line.I’m planning to go to Georgia myself to campaign for Herschel and help him out - but what he really needs is cash. So, what we need to do is get our money up for Herschel so we can **TAKE BACK THE SENATE!**
| [LET’S SUPPORT HERSCHEL - DONATE $100](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c8e02845f2&e=fdefed58de)

Control of the U.S. Senate comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so EVERY SINGLE SECOND is critical. Let’s make sure that we get our brother Herschel over the line and secure that victory for Georgia and America.This is our last chance to get our Red Wave. I’m in. Are you?Sincerely,

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Honoring our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| Today is Veterans Day, and I want to take a moment to recognize the service of thousands of Americans in our armed forces, and their children and families.

These brave men and women put their lives on the line and sacrificed to protect our country’s freedom and democracy both at home and abroad.

It is our veterans who are putting their lives at risk so we can continue to better our lives, communities, and nation.

**In Congress, I promise to always advocate for the best interests of our veterans and current service members.** Our government has a responsibility to ensure our veterans receive the quality care and benefits they deserve.

So today, I hope you will take a minute out of your day to honor these heroes.

And to our veterans in Ohio’s first Congressional District and beyond — I deeply thank you for your service to our country. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your service and your sacrifice.

Thank you,

Greg Landsman
Congressman-elect, OH-01
---
| | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201
www.landsmanforcongress.com

Fellow American - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eccd3b7fd88a46d59f722ece16976253&_e=36NhGqJru6TlONVweQ844j2Sk5SbYFttmgX_x6xBNacM81SrYIFwhLURFfks8WQXGXLfqBp3vedgCI9VqRI3dJ2AWMdYCCO_6SaKuGODTxINxtscMgIz8jLEf8dzbJEyumeAaTuHlIXx47polp-Emt78iqJn0ZBlWfkN_hkbeFyK3Y1o67ITXs67AvyefDddjzrQWp2drWH6RdEXXM-QuAnwm3bUfzXfBeUuGUkouTYCBkFzctq5_9HmqXpyXqVCBeLm8hHF88qncXQhnTqOCTUNvIHx4vjpaYnegkWUD4-OG9mepA1TTX5FbOPVFXqlWEM3j6djOPERnDob_GiKai1qd0dnv8ogA0VWPQWPiRE1FnTtKwbkPr97wmSOcp2AO0lqjEA0B2xwdlw9zvoa1eWKS19OFZlamQXBuW7RCO3hwPqI26yPGXyOVzeH1cao)

clean_body: My race has officially gone into a runoff. I can’t win without your help. | Fellow American - brace yourself. This Georgia Senate race is far from over. Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. However, my campaign is running on empty. The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP. This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Wes Moore
subject: Happy Veterans Day to my brothers and sisters who served
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54484445/378667106/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_na_20221111veteransday_wm_od30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWRjYmRjNy0wYzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYRyUTEp4Oe7mIhG39U1SjC4V_cCj3-QMbJZhFvM8Uk=)
---
Friends, Happy Veterans Day to all of my fellow veterans in Maryland and across the country! **The truth is, your service has not just earned you recognition and respect for a day — your service has earned you recognition and respect for a lifetime. We cannot thank you enough.** Service has defined my life, starting when I joined the Army when I was 17, through leading soldiers in combat with the 82nd Airborne in Afghanistan. It is how I learned the simple principle that would guide the rest of my life and this campaign: Leave No One Behind. |
---
For those who understand the importance of Veterans Day and who feel it personally, you’ve earned that.
You left your families, you put on the uniform of this country, you sweat, you bled, and you sacrificed. You made sure that not only you and your mission were successful, but the mission of all the people to your left and your right — your brothers and your sisters — was successful, as well. And that should never be forgotten and will always be appreciated.
We have a commitment to make sure that “thank you for your service” is not just a slogan, but is reinforced in the policies and the way we speak with and treat our veterans.
God bless you, God bless your families, and thank you for stepping up when our country asked. It was an honor sharing the uniform with you.
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland.

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.
---

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: Thank you for getting us this far -- now the fun begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://www.lashrecseaird.com [https://www.lashrecseaird.com]
Friends,
There are moments in life when we realize that good enough is just not good enough. In my six years as your Virginia Delegate, we made massive improvements for working Virginians by raising the living wage, raising teacher pay, improving our roads, passing Breonna’s Law, expanding Medicaid to 500,000 Virginians, ratifying the ERA, decriminalizing marijuana, passing LGBTQ+ protections, expanding voting rights, and so much more.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
But with a threat to women’s healthcare looming over us, I knew good simply wasn’t enough. When I saw an extremist Republican Governor promise to restrict abortion access, I was nervous. When I saw the GOP win the Lt. Governor’s seat, the AG’s seat, and the Virginia House, I was upset. But when I saw Virginia’s last anti-choice Democrat promise to work with that extremist GOP agenda to ban abortion against the will of the People—I knew I could not sit idle.
I’m running for Virginia Senate because this is a matter of life and death for millions of women in Virginia, and we need representation who reflects the will of the People, not that of extremist politicians or mega corporations.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lashrecse]
You have helped us get this far, and I know you will help us cross the finish line with a victory in 2023. Thank you for all you have done, and continue to do. Stay tuned for some exciting announcements next week.
Sincerely,
Lashrecse

But when I saw Virginia’s last anti-choice Democrat promise to work with that extremist GOP agenda to ban abortion against the will of the People—I knew I could not sit idle. I’m running for Virginia Senate because this is a matter of life and death for millions of women in Virginia, and we need representation who reflects the will of the People, not that of extremist politicians or mega corporations. Donate [] You have helped us get this far, and I know you will help us cross the finish line with a victory in 2023. Thank you for all you have done, and continue to do. Stay tuned for some exciting announcements next week. Sincerely, Lashrecse [] [] [] [] Donate Now [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . www.LashrecseAird.com [] Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird P.O. Box 3943 Petersburg, VA 23805

clean_body: If this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia blue last cycle, we can win this runoff. | | Election Day may be behind us, but our work is far from finished, Derek. The Senate race in Georgia is headed to a runoff -- and that means the result of this election depends on what we do between now and December 6. You haven’t donated this year to the DNC. Split a $10 donation between Raphael Warnock’s campaign and the DNC to help win this runoff, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats nationwide. Derek, it all comes down to the Peach State. Raphael Warnock is running against Herschel Walker -- a MAGA Republican who supports a nationwide abortion ban, opposes Medicaid expansion, and has aligned himself with Rick Scott -- the architect of the GOP efforts to slash Social Security and Medicare. You better believe Republicans are going to do everything they can to take back power and block Democrats from continuing to make any progress for workers and families across the country. That includes pouring millions of dollars into this runoff to defeat Sen. Warnock. But their efforts are no match for the power of grassroots supporters like you, so please: We’re racing against the clock to reach every voter, run statewide ads, and fuel important on-the-ground efforts so we can re-elect Raphael Warnock and keep this seat blue. But if this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia blue last cycle, we can win in Georgia and across the country. Thanks for everything, The Democrats When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. body:

Peter Willis,

Thanks to your incredible outpouring of
donations, we overcame hundreds of millions of dollars in dark money to
defeat Dr. Oz in PA and stop a MAGA takeover of the Senate.

If it weren't for your support, there is no way we would have been able to
mobilize our 267,000 supporters in PA. Without our massive targeted
campaign, we would have woken up on Wednesday to a much darker political
reality.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8005?t=1011&akid=3726%2E5885482%2E8yL2-L ]However, to keep the Senate, we still have more work to do. With the
Georgia runoff in less than a month, can we count on you to rush a
donation to help scale up our get-out-the-vote program? We raised turnout
by 11% per voter contact in the 2020 runoff election, so every gift will
significantly increase our chances of victory!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

America’s most authoritarian billionaires are pouring millions into
Georgia to spread disinformation, suppress voters, and trick folks into
voting against their economic interests.

That's why our organizers are working around the clock to communicate with
voters and ensure that everyone has the information they need to overcome
voter suppression tactics and knows what's at stake for their pocketbooks
and personal freedom.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8005?t=1018&akid=3726%2E5885482%2E8yL2-L ]Can we count on you to chip in now to help us scale up our organizing
work in Georgia in the final weeks before the December 6 runoff?

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

Peter,

Ron DeSantis crushed the Democrats Tuesday in Florida. He left no doubt that he’s the future of the Republican Party going into the 2024 Presidential race.

The Democrat Party in Florida is in total disarray because of Ron and his unwavering pro-Freedom leadership.

After Tuesday, it’s clear America needs Ron DeSantis. While wokeism dies in Florida, in the rest of the Country Democrats are spreading their radical Leftist agenda.

If you agree, it’s time to take action and let Ron know America is begging him to answer the call and Run for President in 2024. [**Sign the post-election petition to Draft Ron.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6e20d946ebd1466e8832047538ae9ac0&_e=-nbc_cHTxSm_sI-Drib-FNWCHrRMw2VcfAyU-lsdSwOVzAZDz2JP5Z6EGkmLa-9qcpwQkIB7iQR3_Wcd6rR6T8Rjp9tUiUNhQMdgMFG6IaH_N8VuJmUhsP4pi1zUGQE9JCk0WiFHIAdLSO1tIHEW409fQrVbJv8ftgCP9iYh73NkNS-QVRox-PgY-sFYEUVaobB4aJsGgXtwWY5K22tPZSAqd7WaThWYca25JjMJV3-pnPR-XyrnPAEagYOcGEZYAv2N1TXgVZHXWYze8_s_ds_FjPAABXghuoZSZzy00bub_n-Xnv-uytR43HAa7K229tFShbxhYRGn0Dco5PFjAGfWHsK5L8s3FC_bI21f3PiV6bMjywTMiXQ5Zp5MEfSZdq0wRg225NqrcPBonPvwaIBXmWkD47YHC6hYPmO4GYZ_MtHgjpz2IW8BBdoJCz6bIFs5Tprmrh3BriAPvg9skw%3D%3D)

[**DRAFT RON FOR PRESIDENT >>**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6e20d946ebd1466e8832047538ae9ac0&_e=-nbc_cHTxSm_sI-Drib-FNWCHrRMw2VcfAyU-lsdSwOVzAZDz2JP5Z6EGkmLa-9qcpwQkIB7iQR3_Wcd6rR6T8Rjp9tUiUNhQMdgMFG6IaH_N8VuJmUhsP4pi1zUGQE9JCk0WiFHIAdLSO1tIHEW409fQrVbJv8ftgCP9iYh73NkNS-QVRox-PgY-sFYEUVaobB4aJsGgXtwWY5K22tPZSAqd7WaThWYca25JjMJV3-pnPR-XyrnPAEagYOcGEZYAv2N1TXgVZHXWYze8_s_ds_FjPAABXghuoZSZzy00bvWkUuV7T7aK6LpXidXFurpohlsP9j8-gAuimrny2Kvg_hbqZdgHTwKYZBaQzT5Hu5zh1lPEfA2qtAu_DTbmMHfkRVaKB1kjcb9I1Z0rXMauWGuMHooxtcckdfKsSvMKEWCH30N565DBIipxKZeqqpJeX6ab1z1qCUR9y8JfVQAYQ%3D%3D)

name: INDEMS
subject: Fast Facts Friday - A Message from Chair Mike Schmuhl & Myla Eldridge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Dear Hoosier Democrats, On behalf of our Democratic Party, we wanted to say thank you for your hard work and support this election cycle. Whether you volunteered, invested in our party, attended an event, or ran for office, we are grateful for you and your involvement. Despite running against an onslaught of outside money against us, we held the line and protected a number of targeted incumbents on Election Day, including Congressman Frank Mrvan who had a big win in northwest Indiana. We are all incredibly proud of all of our candidates who stepped up to run this year. Mayor Tom McDermott, Destiny Wells, ZeNai Brooks, and Jessica McClellan formed a historic statewide ticket and brought new energy and new ideas to our party. Many new Democrats put their names on ballots this year – from the precinct level to countywide to Congressional districts. Their growing engagement in our party is making us stronger. We have more work to do to rebuild our party so we can be more competitive and win more races. Next year’s municipal races are good opportunities for us to elect and reelect more Democratic community leaders across the state – and we continue to build on our approach of going everywhere and talking with everyone. When we became chair and vice-chair of the party last year, we set out to put in place a strategic plan to win by embarking on a new media approach, investing more in year-round organizing and party infrastructure, improving candidate recruitment, and building an INGOP War Room to call out extremism. This work continues and we will do a deep dive into this election so we can see what worked and where we need to grow. Everyone has a seat at that table. Indiana will be a stronger state and a better place to live and work when there is more balance at every level of Hoosier government: Federal, state, and local. We believe we will get there – it’s just a matter of time. Thank you again for your support. Mike Schmuhl, Chair
Myla Eldridge, Vice-Chair **\- 🎖️Celebrating Veterans Day🎖️ -** _In an era where our values have been put into question and the commitment to democracy was at the forefront of conversations, this Veterans Day provides the annual reminder of what brings us together as Americans and Hoosiers far outweighs what divides us. The Indiana Democratic Party honors those who have made many sacrifices - sometimes the ultimate sacrifice - to defend democracy and the freedom’s we cherish most, both at home and overseas._ _It’s important to show this gratitude through action as well, and it’s why the State Party remains committed to advocating for our brave men and women and the future they are owed for showing the ultimate commitment to the founding principles of the United States. This includes fulfilling a promise to deliver quality and life-saving health care via the PACT Act, higher education, and job opportunities that would create a better future for them and their families._ _One day is not enough to say thank you but Indiana Democrats wish all those who have served our country a Happy Veterans Day._
**DEC. 16 - INDEMS’ ANNUAL HOLIDAY PARTY** INDems wants to personally invite you to our annual Holiday Ball on Friday, December 16th! The event will be at the Skyline Club, located on the 36th floor of the One America building in Downtown Indianapolis (1 American Square Indianapolis, IN 46282). **Click[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54485019/378669670/855522537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg3NjU5MC0xNDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OHkIPfMzgQE9JkYCA7mRTCaJvU-OikZLf00Cd2Q-JQ=) to purchase tickets. Event details are below:** **** This event is a great opportunity to celebrate the holiday season with fellow Hoosier Democrats. Heavy hors d’oeuvres and cocktails will be served. Additional sponsorship opportunities are available. Sponsors’ Reception tickets: $250
General Reception tickets: $100 Please RSVP to Daniela Cuervo at daniela@indems.org or purchase your tickets [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54485020/378669671/855522537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg3NjU5MC0xNDYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OHkIPfMzgQE9JkYCA7mRTCaJvU-OikZLf00Cd2Q-JQ=).
**\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring! -** **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at https://www.indems.org/jobs/ ###

name: Max Steiner
subject: Thank You For Your Support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928
body:
| |
---
Friend

I just wanted to thank you for your support in this election cycle. I wanted to wait a little bit to see what our final numbers were -- or to at least find out what our government (House and Senate) was going to look like in January. Looks like it's going to be a while, though. So, with today being Veterans Day, a lot of people are thanking me for my service and I wanted to THANK YOU for supporting me, and believing in our democracy in 2022. A lot of pundits were predicting a red wave. We definitely didn't get that at a national level. We'll see what the final number looks like, but the Democratic Party had a historically good showing. Sadly, District 1 did not. We did far better than the numbers suggested. _The New York Times_ predicted that we would lose by 27%, and we are currently down 19% - but it wasn't enough. It's a bit depressing on my end, but I'm glad that I tried. And I want you to know that your support was appreciated. I will not be running again in 2024, but I hope that whoever steps up earns your full support as well. Thanks again,

Max
---

* * *
| Paid for by Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928

# A Heartbreaking Loss
---
| [DONATE](https://thepoliticalmatrix.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3bea68b6a04118d41358241a&id=d041c5b6e8&e=10b14e738f "DONATE")
---
| While the rest of America moved forward Tuesday, Florida took a giant leap back. Words cannot express how shocked and disappointed we all have been to watch the election unfold in our beautiful state. Though Florida may have let us down, those of you who have worked for, volunteered with, donated to, or supported our campaign made miracles happen on this campaign trail. We outperformed every democrat on the ballot in Northwest Florida, and that’s entirely thanks to supporters like you. We used our campaign as a catalyst for good – and the good we’ve done in our community does not stop because the election is over. This fight was never just about one candidate, one issue, one election. This fight was about saving our state and this nation from the necrosis eating at its soul, consuming what is good and decent in this world and leaving nothing but rot for our children. Our fight is far from over. We’ll continue serving our community in Northwest Florida as we prepare to keep fighting. This community has shown me what the power of good can do, and I will be forever grateful for that. Please consider helping us balance our books and prepare for our next steps if you’re able[. Click here](https://thepoliticalmatrix.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3bea68b6a04118d41358241a&id=9fc735db7f&e=10b14e738f) to donate before we close our accounts for this cycle. If you would like to help Rebekah and her family directly, please [click here](https://thepoliticalmatrix.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3bea68b6a04118d41358241a&id=bed050fee7&e=10b14e738f).
